title: MP कांग्रेस में सब ठीक? दिग्विजय-पटवारी की जुगलबंदी पर उठे सवाल, बढ़ रही BJP की ताकत; देखें VIDEO
description: mp congress controversy: मध्य प्रदेश कांग्रेस में दिग्विजय सिंह और जीतू पटवारी के विरोधाभासी बयानों से बढ़ी आंतरिक कलह। बैठक में विधायकों ने उठाए सवाल, पार्टी को हो रहा नुकसान। जानिए पूरी खबर।
content:
Digvijaya Singh Statement On Jitu Patwari: यह वीडियो मध्य प्रदेश कांग्रेस में हालिया आंतरिक कलह और पूर्व मुख्यमंत्री दिग्विजय सिंह तथा प्रदेश कांग्रेस अध्यक्ष जीतू पटवारी के बयानों के बीच उभरे मतभेदों पर केंद्रित है। यहाँ मुख्य घटनाक्रम दिए गए हैं। पिछले कुछ दिनों से दिग्विजय सिंह और जीतू पटवारी के विरोधाभासी बयानों ने कांग्रेस के भीतर और बाहर हलचल बढ़ा दी है। विशेष रूप से उज्जैन से जुड़े एक मामले पर दिग्विजय सिंह की टिप्पणियों ने पार्टी के स्टैंड पर सवाल खड़े कर दिए।
कांग्रेस की संसदीय मामलों की बैठक में विधायकों (आरिफ मसूद और प्रवीण पाठक) ने खुले तौर पर सवाल उठाया कि दोनों नेताओं में से सही कौन बोल रहा है, जिससे कार्यकर्ताओं में असमंजस और पार्टी का स्टैंड कमजोर हुआ। तो वहीं बढ़ते विवाद के बीच, दिग्विजय सिंह और जीतू पटवारी ने एक साथ प्रेस कॉन्फ्रेंस कर सफाई दी। दिग्विजय सिंह ने जीतू पटवारी को अपने &#8216;पुत्रवत&#8217; बताया और कहा कि उनके बयानों को गलत तरीके से पेश किया गया था, और पार्टी का स्टैंड एक ही है। सोशल मीडिया पर समर्थकों के बीच सक्रियता और इससे पहले दिग्विजय सिंह को कुर्सी से उठाने का वायरल वीडियो इस बात की चर्चा बढ़ा रहे हैं कि पार्टी में सब कुछ ठीक नहीं है, जिसका फायदा बीजेपी को मिल रहा है।

title: হোমষ্টেত উদ্ধাৰ কলেজীয়া ছাত্ৰীৰ মৃতদেহ...
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ,শিৱসাগৰঃ শিৱসাগৰৰ ঐতিহাসিক ৰংঘৰৰ সমীপৱৰ্তী জোনাকী নগৰ অঞ্চলত এক ভয়ংকৰ  ঘটনা  সংঘটিত হয়। অঞ্চলটোত অৱস্থিত “হলিডে হোমষ্টে” নামৰ এটা আৱাসগৃহৰ পৰা এগৰাকী কলেজীয়া ছাত্ৰীৰ মৃতদেহ উদ্ধাৰ হোৱা ঘটনাই সমগ্ৰ শিৱসাগৰ জিলাতে তীব্ৰ চাঞ্চল্যৰ সৃষ্টি কৰিছে।
প্ৰাপ্ত তথ্য অনুসৰি, মৃত ছাত্ৰীগৰাকীৰ নাম কৃষ্ণা গগৈ বুলি জানিব পৰা হৈছে। দুৰ্ভগীয়া যুৱতীগৰাকীৰ ঘৰ শিৱসাগৰৰে বাকচু খেলুৱা অঞ্চলত। হোমষ্টেটোৰ কোঠাৰ ভিতৰত ছাত্ৰীগৰাকীৰ মৃতদেহ উদ্ধাৰ হোৱাৰ পাছতে স্থানীয় ৰাইজে আৰক্ষীক খবৰ দিয়ে।
 আনফাসে, ঘটনাৰ খবৰ পাই শিৱসাগৰ জিলা আৰক্ষীৰ এটা দল ততাতৈয়াকৈ ঘটনাস্থলীত উপস্থিত হয় আৰু মৃতদেহটো উদ্ধাৰ কৰি মৰণোত্তৰ পৰীক্ষাৰ বাবে প্ৰেৰণ কৰে। ঘটনাৰ প্ৰাৰম্ভিক তদন্তৰ ভিত্তিত আৰক্ষীয়ে তাৎক্ষণিকভাৱে অবিনাশ কোঁৱৰ নামৰ এজন যুৱকক আটক কৰিছে। আটক কৰা যুৱকজনৰ ঘৰ বেতবাৰীৰ ২ নং কোঁৱৰ গাঁৱত বুলি আৰক্ষীৰ সূত্ৰই প্ৰকাশ কৰিছে।
স্থানীয় ৰাইজৰ অভিযোগ অনুসৰি এই হোমষ্টেলৈ প্ৰায়ে আহে একাংশ কমবয়সীয়া যুৱক-যুৱতী। কিছুদিন পূৰ্বে একাংশই সুৰাপান কৰি হূলস্থুল কৰিছিল হোমষ্টেৰ সন্মুখত। তাৰ পাছতে আৰক্ষীয়ে আটক কৰি লৈ গৈছিল দলটোক।

title: Mango Kheer: गर्मियों में आम से बनाएं शाही मैंगो खीर, एक बार खाएंगे तो बार-बार बनाने का करेगा मन
description: Mango Kheer Recipe: अगर आप गर्मियों में आम से कुछ खास और स्वादिष्ट बनाना चाहते हैं, तो शाही मैंगो खीर एक बेहतरीन विकल्प है। जानें इसे बनाने की आसान रेसिपी और जरूरी सामग्री।
content:
Mango Kheer At Home: गर्मियों का मौसम आते ही आम की मिठास हर घर की रसोई का हिस्सा बन जाती है। आम से मैंगो शेक, आमरस, आइसक्रीम और कई तरह की रेसिपी बनाई जाती हैं। अगर इस बार आप कुछ नया, स्वादिष्ट और घर पर आसानी से बनने वाला समर डेज़र्ट ट्राई करना चाहते हैं, तो मैंगो खीर आपके लिए एक बेहतरीन विकल्प हो सकती है।
दूध, चावल और रसीले पके आम से तैयार होने वाली यह खीर स्वाद में बेहद क्रीमी होती है और बच्चों से लेकर बड़ों तक हर किसी को पसंद आती है।
मैंगो खीर बनाने के लिए क्या-क्या चाहिए?

1 लीटर फुल क्रीम दूध
½ कप बासमती चावल (धोकर 30 मिनट भिगोए हुए)
1 कप पके आम का गूदा
4-5 बड़े चम्मच चीनी (स्वादानुसार)
½ छोटा चम्मच इलायची पाउडर
8-10 कटे हुए बादाम
8-10 कटे हुए काजू
1 बड़ा चम्मच कटा हुआ पिस्ता
थोड़ा-सा केसर

घर पर ऐसे तैयार करें स्वाद से भरपूर मैंगो खीर
सबसे पहले एक भारी तले वाले बर्तन में दूध को अच्छी तरह उबाल लें। अब इसमें पहले से भिगोए हुए चावल डालें और धीमी आंच पर लगातार चलाते हुए पकाएं। जब चावल पूरी तरह गल जाएं और खीर गाढ़ी हो जाए, तब इसमें चीनी और इलायची पाउडर डालकर अच्छी तरह मिला लें।
अब गैस बंद कर दें और खीर को पूरी तरह ठंडा होने दें।
जब खीर सामान्य तापमान पर आ जाए, तब उसमें ताजे पके आम का गूदा मिलाकर अच्छी तरह मिक्स करें। ध्यान रखें कि गर्म खीर में आम का गूदा बिल्कुल न डालें, क्योंकि इससे दूध फट सकता है।
ये भी पढे़ं&#8211;Dry Hair Tips: रूखे बालों को सिल्की और चमकदार बनाएंगे ये 6 घरेलू उपाय, पहली बार में ही दिखने लगेगा फर्क
अंत में ऊपर से बादाम, काजू, पिस्ता और केसर डालकर सजाएं। खीर को कुछ देर फ्रिज में ठंडा होने दें और फिर ठंडी-ठंडी मैंगो खीर पूरे परिवार के साथ सर्व करें।
गर्मियों में मैंगो खीर खाना क्यों माना जाता है खास?
मैंगो खीर सिर्फ स्वाद में ही नहीं, बल्कि पोषण के लिहाज से भी एक शानदार समर डेज़र्ट है। इसमें मौजूद आम विटामिन A और C का अच्छा स्रोत होता है, जबकि दूध शरीर को कैल्शियम और प्रोटीन प्रदान करता है। वहीं ड्राई फ्रूट्स हेल्दी फैट्स, फाइबर और कई जरूरी मिनरल्स की पूर्ति करते हैं।
स्वाद के साथ सेहत का भी मिलेगा भरपूर फायदा
गर्मियों में मैंगो खीर खाने से शरीर को तुरंत ऊर्जा मिलती है। यह लंबे समय तक पेट भरा रखने में मदद करती है और थकान महसूस होने पर ताजगी का एहसास भी दिला सकती है। सीमित मात्रा में सेवन करने पर यह बच्चों और बड़ों दोनों के लिए स्वादिष्ट और पौष्टिक समर डेज़र्ट साबित हो सकती है।

title: The Uddhav Meltdown Has A Bengal Template — And A Two-Thirds Trap
description: The decline of Shiv Sena (UBT) reflects a broader trend among regional parties in India. Major losses in elections, such as UBT's dwindling legislative strength and TMC's internal coup, reveal a pattern where parties, often centered around a single leader, become vulnerable.
content: The erosion of Shiv Sena (UBT) is not a Maharashtra-specific event. It is the second time in two months that a major regional party built around one leader has been hollowed out through the same legal mechanism — and the Bengal case shows where it ends. This is starting to look like a pattern, not a one-off.The defection of UBT MLC Sachin Ahir on Tuesday (June 30) is best read as confirmation of a trajectory, not an isolated setback. Ahir, a close Uddhav Thackeray aide whose Worli base overlaps Aaditya Thackeray's own constituency, joined Eknath Shinde's Shiv Sena and filed for Deputy Chairman of the Legislative Council. The Shinde camp calls it the second phase of "Operation Tiger" — the first targeting MPs, the second now aimed at MLAs and MLCs.The sharper comparison is not the Sena's own 2022 split but what happened to the Trinamool Congress weeks earlier. The two cases share a mechanism, a sequence and an adversary — which is what makes "the Bengal template" more than a rhetorical device.Same Date, Same MethodThe clearest sign of a shared pattern is the timing. On June 22, a faction removed Mamata Banerjee as TMC chairperson — described by insiders as an internal coup — allegedly ending her near three-decade hold over the party she founded in 1998. The same day in Mumbai, six of the nine MPs elected on the UBT symbol merged into Shinde's faction, cutting Uddhav's Lok Sabha strength to three.The method is statutory, not incidental. The six MPs held a two-thirds share of the party's parliamentary group — the exact threshold the anti-defection law requires for a bloc to merge without disqualification. Bengal ran on the same arithmetic: 58 of the 80 TMC MLAs elected in 2026, past two-thirds, signed a letter installing the expelled Ritabrata Banerjee as Leader of the Opposition, a figure the rebels now put at 64. Separately, around 20 of the TMC's 28 MPs have signalled a move toward the NDA. In both cases the Tenth Schedule's merger clause — drafted to deter defection — became the instrument that legalised it.The Structural Cause: Parties That Survive On A FaceThe mechanism explains how, not why both parties proved so easy to dismantle. Parties organised around a single charismatic leader, with thin institutional scaffolding and no firm ideological core, rise and fall with the personal fortunes of their supremo. Both the TMC and the UBT fit: each was a vehicle for a face, not a platform for a programme."Traditional parties, just like independents or independent parties, also have an age limit. As per my understanding, the average age of parties is around 30 to 40 years. Once a party reaches this threshold, there are pressures on the party for survival," said political analyst Amitabh Tiwari."National parties can survive because of their ideological positions and strong presence across the country… These regional parties in India are, anyway, controlled by families. The family-controlling people hold them together. But once a party loses the respect that the family commands, the ranks decline because the leaders then feel the head of the party is not able to look at their roots," he added.On the UBT setback, Tiwari said: "Most of the regional parties are in their second or third stage — a different dynasty, sort of. Second or third stage. What happens in that stage is that a lot of people are compared to the original regional leaders — for example, Balasaheb. A lot of people are likened to Balasaheb, but it's not the same as Balasaheb. Because of the lack of charisma and lack of popularity among the leaders, there is also a rebellion against these new leaders."Political commentator Rashid Kidwai located the fault deeper than the statute. "The two-thirds merger provision is not the root cause; it is a mechanism that political actors have learnt to use with increasing sophistication. The deeper issue is that many Indian regional parties have become personality-centric formations rather than institutional organisations. When political authority, electoral appeal, or access to power weakens, legislators begin to view parties less as ideological homes and more as political vehicles. The Shiv Sena and NCP splits demonstrated that the battle is no longer merely about ideology or loyalty, but about who controls the name, symbol, inheritance, and political future. In contemporary politics, parties increasingly risk becoming temporary containers rather than enduring institutions."The fragility stays dormant in victory and turns fatal in defeat. Once the verdict turns, the leader's value to ambitious legislators collapses and the two-thirds exit becomes self-preservation, not ideological rupture. That engine turned over in Bengal first.The Defeats Came Before The DefectionsIn both states, the electoral collapse preceded — and triggered — the desertions. The TMC was reduced to roughly 80 seats in the Assembly election declared on May 4, 2026, ending 15 years of rule and down from 215 in 2021. Mamata herself lost Bhabanipur to Suvendu Adhikari, sworn in on May 9 as Bengal's first BJP chief minister. Tellingly, the man now running Bengal came not from the BJP's own stable but from Mamata's — Adhikari, once a Nandigram-era loyalist, had crossed over citing alienation.The UBT's decline was slower but followed the same logic. Cut to 20 MLAs in 2024, the decisive blow came locally: in January 2026 Uddhav's reunion with cousin Raj Thackeray, after two decades, failed to move voters, and the Mahayuti crossed the majority mark in the BMC — ending the family's near three-decade hold over India's wealthiest civic body. A brand that can no longer carry its home city is one whose carriers begin to leave.Where The Erosion Now PointsThe bleed is spreading from Parliament into the Assembly. Maharashtra minister Gulabrao Patil claims "Operation Tiger 2.0" is underway and that more than 14 of the UBT's 20 MLAs could cross over; a group of UBT MLAs reportedly met Shinde during the monsoon session. The number is not arbitrary — 14 is exactly two-thirds of 20.This is a claim by an adversary, not an established fact, and the analysis turns on that. What is established is the MP merger, the Ahir defection and the BMC loss; what is asserted is the MLA exodus. But the structural exposure is real: the party sits six legislators from the same statutory erasure in the assembly it has already suffered in the Lok Sabha.Fadnavis said, "Uddhav ji did not introspect, and this is the consequence." Uddhav countered  that this was "Operation Devendra" — a plot to weaken Fadnavis before he could emerge as a PM contender — an allegation Fadnavis rejected.Is this, then, a repeatable playbook against any regional party that loses power? Kidwai sees a wider shift. "The developments in Maharashtra and West Bengal suggest a broader pattern in Indian politics where electoral competition increasingly shifts away from the voter and towards managing the political field itself. Whether through engineered splits, defections, legal manoeuvres, candidate withdrawals, or the use of smaller political formations as vehicles for realignment, the methods have become more systematic and sophisticated. This is not unique to one state, but reflects a larger transformation in Indian politics where parties with stronger organisational machinery, resources, and institutional leverage enjoy a structural advantage. The concern is not simply who deploys these tactics, but that political competition itself is increasingly being shaped before voters cast their ballots."Where The Templates DivergeFirst, motive. In Bengal, the rebels still profess loyalty to Mamata Banerjee even as they sideline her nephew Abhishek — making that revolt partly a succession fight. The UBT crisis has no such ambiguity: it is a straight migration toward power, with Uddhav still atop a shrinking party and Aaditya his undisputed heir.Second, baseline. Mamata fell from an office she had held for years; Uddhav has held none since 2022. His response is limited to what little is left to him — touring the rebel MPs' constituencies and insisting he leads the "original and only Shiv Sena" — while his party brands the defectors not rebels but "traitors" who were bought off.The outcome will be settled less by mobilisation than by adjudication. Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla is expected to rule on the defections in both parties before the monsoon session opens in the third week of July. For the TMC, a parallel fight over name and symbol is headed to the Election Commission and the courts. Those rulings — not the constituency tours — will decide whether either supremo keeps anything beyond a label.

title: अयोध्या के बाद अब आगरा के मंदिर में डाका! भगवान के चढ़ावे पर ‘चौथ’ वसूलने का Video हुआ वायरल
description: Temple Donation Theft UP: आगरा के रनकता स्थित शनिदेव मंदिर में दान पेटी के पैसों को लेकर बवाल मचा हुआ है। दबंगों द्वारा मारपीट और रंगदारी मांगने की शिकायत के बाद पुलिस जांच में जुट गई है।
content:
Agra Shani Mandir Controversy: उत्तर प्रदेश में अयोध्या के राम मंदिर चंदा विवाद की गूंज अभी थमी भी नहीं थी कि अब ताजनगरी आगरा से भी एक ऐसा ही हैरान करने वाला मामला सामने आया है। आगरा के रनकता स्थित यमुना नदी के किनारे बने ऐतिहासिक और बरसों पुराने शनिदेव मंदिर में चढ़ावे और दान पेटी के पैसों को लेकर भारी हंगामा खड़ा हो गया है। सोशल मीडिया पर एक वीडियो तेजी से वायरल हो रहा है, जिसमें ट्रस्ट का ही एक व्यक्ति अपने दबंग साथियों के साथ मंदिर पहुंचता है। वहां जमकर गाली-गलौज, मारपीट और हाथापाई की जाती है।
आरोप है कि मंदिर से ₹10,000 की चौथ (रंगदारी) मांगी गई और रात के समय दान पात्र में रखे सारे पैसे लूटकर आरोपी फरार हो गए। इस घटना से स्थानीय लोगों और हिंदूवादी संगठनों में भारी आक्रोश है। सिकंदरा थाना पुलिस को तहरीर दे दी गई है और पुलिस मामले की जांच कर रही है, वहीं हिंदूवादियों ने जल्द कार्रवाई न होने पर सड़कों पर उतरने की चेतावनी दी है।

title: 15 रुपये के ऑर्डर पर महिला ने Blinkit राइडर को दिए 500 रुपये टिप, इमोशनल वीडियो ने जीता लोगों का दिल
description: Delivery Boy  500 Tip : सोशल मीडिया पर एक Blinkit राइडर का वीडियो वायरल हो रहा है, जिसमें वह बताता है कि 15 रुपये के ऑर्डर पर एक महिला ने उसे 500 रुपये की टिप दी।
content:
Blinkit Viral Video : सोशल मीडिया पर इन दिनों एक Blinkit डिलीवरी राइडर का भावुक कर देने वाला वीडियो तेजी से वायरल हो रहा है। वीडियो में राइडर बताता है कि एक महिला ग्राहक ने सिर्फ 15 रुपये के ऑर्डर पर उसे 500 रुपये की टिप दी। राइडर के मुताबिक, यह रकम उसकी लगभग दो दिन की कमाई के बराबर है।
वीडियो देखने के बाद लोग न सिर्फ महिला की दरियादिली की तारीफ कर रहे हैं, बल्कि डिलीवरी पार्टनर्स की मेहनत और संघर्ष को भी समझने की बात कह रहे हैं। वीडियो का लिंक&#8230;

एक डिलीवरी बॉय ₹15 का सामान लेकर एक लड़की के घर पहुंचा
सामान लेने के बाद लड़की ने उसे ₹500 की टिप दे दी
इतनी बड़ी टिप देखकर वह भावुक हो गया और बोला दीदी,₹500 कमाने में मुझे पूरे दो दिन लग जाते हैं
उसने दिलसे लड़की का शुक्रिया अदा करते हुए कहा आज आपने मेरा दिन बना..Read news pic.twitter.com/bLLNarDrki
— Ayesha Majid Khan (@Ayesha786Majid) June 30, 2026

15 रुपये के ऑर्डर पर 500 रुपये की टिप
वीडियो को &#8220;I&#8217;m Blinkit Rider&#8221; नाम के सोशल मीडिया अकाउंट से शेयर किया गया है। वीडियो में राइडर अपनी साइकिल, Blinkit की यूनिफॉर्म और डिलीवरी बैग के साथ दिखाई देता है। वह बताता है कि वह एक ऑर्डर डिलीवर करने गया था, जिसके बाद उसने ऐप में अपनी उस समय तक की कमाई भी दिखाई, जो केवल 97 रुपये थी।
इसके बाद वह हाथ में 500 रुपये का नोट दिखाते हुए कहता है कि एक &#8220;दीदी&#8221; ने 15 रुपये के ऑर्डर पर उसे 500 रुपये टिप में दिए। वह भावुक होकर कहता है कि इतनी रकम तो वह दो दिन में भी मुश्किल से कमा पाता है। वीडियो में वह कई बार उस महिला का धन्यवाद करता हुआ नजर आता है।
ये खबर भी पढ़ें : 20 राज्यों का दौरा करने के बाद ऑस्ट्रेलियाई व्लॉगर ने दी भारत को रेटिंग, राजस्थान-केरल की जमकर तारीफ की
महिला की दरियादिली की जमकर तारीफ
वीडियो वायरल होने के बाद सोशल मीडिया पर यूजर्स लगातार अपनी प्रतिक्रियाएं दे रहे हैं। कई लोगों ने महिला की तारीफ करते हुए लिखा कि उन्होंने किसी जरूरतमंद की सच्चे दिल से मदद की है। एक यूजर ने लिखा, &#8220;दीदी के लिए रिस्पेक्ट बटन।&#8221; दूसरे ने कहा, &#8220;शायद उन्होंने कभी गरीबी देखी होगी, इसलिए किसी की मेहनत की कीमत समझती हैं।&#8221;
वहीं एक अन्य यूजर ने लिखा कि डिलीवरी एजेंट हर मौसम में कड़ी मेहनत करते हैं और ऐसे छोटे-छोटे कदम उनके चेहरे पर मुस्कान ला सकते हैं। फिलहाल यह वीडियो सोशल मीडिया पर तेजी से वायरल हो रहा है और लोगों का दिल जीत रहा है।

title: അന്വേഷണം തുടങ്ങിയത് മുക്കുപണ്ടം പണയം വെച്ച കേസിൽ, പക്ഷേ ചെന്നെത്തിയത് മുക്കുപണ്ടം നിർമ്മിച്ച് നൽകുന്ന സംഘത്തിലേക്ക്, അറസ്റ്റ്
description: മുക്കുപണ്ടം പണയം വെച്ച് 4 ലക്ഷം തട്ടി: പ്രധാന പ്രതികൾ കണ്ണൂരിൽ പിടിയിൽ
content: <p><strong>ചേർത്തല:</strong> ചേർത്തല നഗരത്തിലെ സ്വകാര്യ ധനകാര്യ സ്ഥാപനത്തിൽ മുക്കുപണ്ടം പണയം വെച്ച് 4 ലക്ഷം രൂപ തട്ടിയെടുത്ത കേസിലെ പ്രധാന പ്രതികൾ പിടിയിലായി. മുക്കുപണ്ടം നിർമിച്ച് നൽകുന്ന സംഘത്തെ കണ്ണൂർ ജില്ലയിൽ നിന്നാണ് ചേർത്തല പോലീസ് അറസ്റ്റ് ചെയ്തത്. കണ്ണൂർ ധർമോദയം പെരിങ്ങോളി പഞ്ചായത്തിൽ ഉഷസ് നിവാസിൽ സന്തോഷ് കുമാർ (55), കണ്ണൂർ ജില്ലയിലെ കോട്ടഞ്ചേരി ചെലിക്കണ്ടി വീട്ടിൽ ( 52) മുസ്തഫ എന്നിവരാണ് പിടിയിലായത്. &nbsp;</p><p>സമാന കേസിൽ നേരത്തെ 3 പേർ പോലീസ് പിടിയിലായിരുന്നു. തുടർന്നുള്ള അന്വേഷണത്തിലാണ് നിർമാണ സംഘത്തെ കുറിച്ചുള്ള വിവരം പോലീസിന് ലഭിച്ചത്. ചേർത്തല സി ഐ ഹേമന്ത് കുമാറിന്റെ നേതൃത്വത്തിൽ എസ് ഐ അനിൽകുമാർ, സീനിയർ സിവിൽ പോലീസ് ഓഫീസർമാരായ സതീഷ്, സുധീഷ്, അജയ് എന്നിവരടങ്ങുന്ന സംഘം കണ്ണൂരിൽ എത്തിയാണ് പ്രതികളെ അറസ്റ്റ് ചെയ്തത്. കോടതിയിൽ ഹാജരാക്കിയ പ്രതികളെ റിമാൻഡ് ചെയ്തു. &nbsp;&nbsp;</p>

title: ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁରରେ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା: ଗୁରୁତରଙ୍କୁ ମିଳିଲାନି ଆମ୍ବୁଲାନ୍ସ, ବେସରକାରୀ ଗାଡ଼ିରେ ମେଡିକାଲ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର, ବଢ଼ିଲା ଅସନ୍ତୋଷ
description:
ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁର, ୩୦।୬ (ଦୁର୍ଗା କୀର୍ତ୍ତି): ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁର ଥାନା ସଦର ସ୍ଥିତ ତାଳବନ୍ଧ ପଡ଼ା ଓ କାଲି ମନ୍ଦିର ପଡ଼ା ମଝିରେ ଥିବା ଦୁଇଟି ବନ୍ଧ ନିକଟରେ ମଙ୍ଗଳବାର ସନ୍ଧ୍ୟା ପ୍ରାୟ ୮.୦୨ ସମୟରେ ଏକ ସଡ଼କ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ଘଟିଯାଇଛି। ଦୁଇଟି ବାଇକ୍ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ମୁହାଁମୁହିଁ ଧକ୍କା ହେବା ଫଳରେ ଦୁଇ ଜଣ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତି ଗୁରୁତର ଭାବେ ଆହତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। ଆହତଙ୍କ ମୁଣ୍ଡ, କପାଳ ଓ ଆଖିରେ ଗଭୀର ଆଘାତ ଲାଗିଥିବା ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି। ଆହତ ଦ୍ୱୟ […]
The post ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁରରେ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା: ଗୁରୁତରଙ୍କୁ ମିଳିଲାନି ଆମ୍ବୁଲାନ୍ସ, ବେସରକାରୀ ଗାଡ଼ିରେ ମେଡିକାଲ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର, ବଢ଼ିଲା ଅସନ୍ତୋଷ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁର, ୩୦।୬ (ଦୁର୍ଗା କୀର୍ତ୍ତି): ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁର ଥାନା ସଦର ସ୍ଥିତ ତାଳବନ୍ଧ ପଡ଼ା ଓ କାଲି ମନ୍ଦିର ପଡ଼ା ମଝିରେ ଥିବା ଦୁଇଟି ବନ୍ଧ ନିକଟରେ ମଙ୍ଗଳବାର ସନ୍ଧ୍ୟା ପ୍ରାୟ ୮.୦୨ ସମୟରେ ଏକ ସଡ଼କ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ଘଟିଯାଇଛି। ଦୁଇଟି ବାଇକ୍ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ମୁହାଁମୁହିଁ ଧକ୍କା ହେବା ଫଳରେ ଦୁଇ ଜଣ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତି ଗୁରୁତର ଭାବେ ଆହତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। ଆହତଙ୍କ ମୁଣ୍ଡ, କପାଳ ଓ ଆଖିରେ ଗଭୀର ଆଘାତ ଲାଗିଥିବା ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି।
ଆହତ ଦ୍ୱୟ ହେଲେ ତହସିଲ ପଡ଼ାର ପୁରୁନ୍ଧର ନାଏକ (୪୦), ପିତା- ବାଳକୃଷ୍ଣ ନାଏକ ଏବଂ ପାଲଜୋର୍ ଗ୍ରାମର ସଦାଶିବ ମାଝୀ (୨୮), ପିତା- ଡମ୍ବରୁଧର ମାଝୀ। ସଦାଶିବ ନିଜ ଗ୍ରାମରୁ ଲାଠିଆଗୁଡ଼ା ଅଭିମୁଖେ ଯାଉଥିବା ବେଳେ ପୁରୁନ୍ଧର ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁର ମାର୍କେଟରୁ ଘରକୁ ଫେରୁଥିଲେ। ଏହି ସମୟରେ ଭାରସାମ୍ୟ ହରାଇ ଦୁହିଁଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ମୁହାଁମୁହିଁ ଧକ୍କା ହୋଇଥିଲା।
ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ପରେ ପ୍ରଥମେ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଲୋକେ ୧୦୮ ଆମ୍ବୁଲାନ୍ସକୁ ଯୋଗାଯୋଗ କରିଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ସେହି ସମୟରେ ଗାଡ଼ି ଉପଲବ୍ଧ ନ ଥିଲା। ଏଭଳି ଜରୁରୀ ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ‘ନବଜୀବନ ଯୁବ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠାନ’ର କର୍ମକର୍ତ୍ତାମାନେ ମେଡିକାଲରୁ ଏକ ଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଚର୍ ଆଣି ଆହତମାନଙ୍କୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରି ପ୍ରାଥମିକ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ପାଇଁ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରକୁ ନେଇଥିଲେ। ଖବର ପାଇ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ପୋଲିସ ମଧ୍ୟ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ସହଯୋଗର ହାତ ବଢ଼ାଇଥିଲା। ଏଥିସହ ଯୁବ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠାନର ସଦସ୍ୟମାନେ ଆହତ ଗରିବ ପୁରୁନ୍ଧର ନାଏକଙ୍କ ପରିବାରକୁ ଆର୍ଥିକ ସହାୟତା ମଧ୍ୟ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିଛନ୍ତି।
ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ପ୍ରାଥମିକ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ପରେ ଦ୍ୱୟଙ୍କ ଅବସ୍ଥା ଗୁରୁତର ଥିବାରୁ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ଭବାନୀପାଟଣା ଜିଲା ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟକୁ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ମାତ୍ର ଦୁର୍ଭାଗ୍ୟବଶତଃ ସେହି ସମୟରେ ମଧ୍ୟ କୌଣସି ଆମ୍ବୁଲାନ୍ସ ମିଳିପାରି ନ ଥିଲା। ଶେଷରେ ବାଧ୍ୟ ହୋଇ ଉଭୟ ପରିବାର ଲୋକେ ନିଜ ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚରେ ଏକ ବେସରକାରୀ ଗାଡ଼ି ଯୋଗାଡ଼ କରି ଆହତମାନଙ୍କୁ ଜିଲା ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାକୁ ନେଇଛନ୍ତି।
୨୪ଟି ଗ୍ରାମ ପଞ୍ଚାୟତ ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ଏହି ବୃହତ ବ୍ଲକରେ ମାତ୍ର ୨ଟି ଆମ୍ବୁଲାନ୍ସ ରହିଛି। ଜରୁରୀ ସମୟରେ ଆମ୍ବୁଲାନ୍ସ ନ ମିଳିବା ସମସ୍ୟା ଏଠାରେ ଦୀର୍ଘଦିନ ଧରି ଲାଗିରହିଛି, ଯାହାକୁ ନେଇ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଜନସାଧାରଣଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ତୀବ୍ର ଅସନ୍ତୋଷ ପ୍ରକାଶ ପାଇଛି। ପ୍ରଶାସନ ଏଥିପ୍ରତି ଦୃଷ୍ଟି ଦେଇ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ସେବାରେ ସୁଧାର ଆଣିବାକୁ ଦାବି ହେଉଛି।
The post ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁରରେ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା: ଗୁରୁତରଙ୍କୁ ମିଳିଲାନି ଆମ୍ବୁଲାନ୍ସ, ବେସରକାରୀ ଗାଡ଼ିରେ ମେଡିକାଲ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର, ବଢ଼ିଲା ଅସନ୍ତୋଷ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Why The Instinct To Protect Caitlin Clark Is Reviving Harmful Stereotypes About Women Athletes
description: What we are seeing as people attempt to protect Cailtin Clark is the harmful framing of women athletes as either fragile and in need of protection, while simultaneously characterizing other’s as too physical and classless.
content: What we are seeing as people attempt to protect Cailtin Clark is the harmful framing of women athletes as either fragile and in need of protection, while simultaneously characterizing other’s as too physical and classless.

title: ‘कांग्रेस में न नेता, न नीति और न ही नियत’; MP कांग्रेस के हंगामे पर दुर्गेश केसवानी ने कसा तंज
description: MP Congress Interal Clash: भोपाल में युवा कांग्रेस की बैठक में हंगामा, कार्यकर्ताओं के बीच धक्का-मुक्की के बाद अध्यक्ष यश घंगोरिया ने किया बीच-बचाव, भाजपा ने साधा तीखा निशाना।
content:
Durgesh Keswani Target MP Congress: मध्य प्रदेश युवा कांग्रेस की प्रदेश कार्यकारिणी की संगठनात्मक बैठक उस समय विवादों में घिर गई, जब बैठक के दौरान कार्यकर्ताओं के बीच तीखी नोकझोंक और धक्का-मुक्की की स्थिति बन गई।
संगठनात्मक रणनीति और आगामी कार्यक्रमों पर चर्चा के लिए बुलाई गई बैठक का माहौल अचानक तनावपूर्ण हो गया। विवाद बढ़ने पर बैठक की कार्यवाही भी कुछ समय के लिए प्रभावित हुई। घटना के बाद यह पूरा घटनाक्रम राजनीतिक गलियारों में चर्चा का विषय बन गया है।
हालात संभालने के लिए प्रदेश अध्यक्ष को करना पड़ा हस्तक्षेप
बैठक में मौजूद कार्यकर्ताओं के बीच विवाद इतना बढ़ गया कि युवा कांग्रेस पार्टी के प्रदेश अध्यक्ष यश घंगोरिया को अपनी कुर्सी छोड़कर स्वयं बीच-बचाव के लिए आगे आना पड़ा। उन्होंने कार्यकर्ताओं को शांत कराने और बैठक का माहौल सामान्य बनाने की कोशिश की। इस दौरान अन्य वरिष्ठ नेताओं ने भी हस्तक्षेप कर स्थिति को नियंत्रित करने का प्रयास किया। हालांकि, बैठक में हुए हंगामे ने संगठन की आंतरिक स्थिति को लेकर कई सवाल खड़े कर दिए हैं।
भाजपा ने कांग्रेस पर बोला तीखा हमला
घटना के सामने आने के बाद भारतीय जनता पार्टी ने कांग्रेस पर तीखा राजनीतिक हमला बोला। भारतीय जनता पार्टी प्रदेश प्रवक्ता डॉ. दुर्गेश केसवानी ने कहा कि युवा कांग्रेस की बैठक में धक्का-मुक्की, हंगामा और हाथापाई जैसी घटनाओं ने कांग्रेस का वास्तविक चरित्र उजागर कर दिया है। उन्होंने आरोप लगाया कि जो नेता संगठन को मजबूत बनाने की बात करते हैं, उनके ही कार्यकर्ता आपसी विवाद में उलझे हुए हैं। भाजपा ने इसे कांग्रेस की आंतरिक गुटबाजी और संगठनात्मक कमजोरी का उदाहरण बताया।
&#8216;न नेता, न नीति और न नियत&#8217; कहकर साधा निशाना
डॉ. दुर्गेश केसवानी ने कहा कि किसी भी राजनीतिक दल की पहचान उसके कार्यकर्ताओं के व्यवहार से होती है। उनके अनुसार, इस घटनाक्रम ने यह साबित कर दिया कि कांग्रेस के पास न स्पष्ट नेतृत्व है, न ठोस नीति और न ही सही नियत।
यह भी पढ़ें: सुरखी विधानसभा में कांग्रेस साफ! पूर्व नगर परिषद अध्यक्ष सैकड़ों समर्थकों संग BJP में शामिल; मची खलबली
उन्होंने तंज कसते हुए कहा कि लोग अब कांग्रेस को &#8220;डूबता हुआ जहाज&#8221; कहने लगे हैं, जिस पर कोई सवार नहीं होना चाहता। हालांकि, इस पूरे घटनाक्रम पर युवा कांग्रेस की ओर से आधिकारिक प्रतिक्रिया का इंतजार है। राजनीतिक विश्लेषकों का मानना है कि बैठक में हुआ यह विवाद आगामी दिनों में प्रदेश की सियासत में चर्चा का विषय बना रह सकता है।

title: Innovative companies in India
description: India's dynamic business landscape is being transformed by a new generation of visionary enterprises that are redefining industry standards through innovation, strategic thinking, and purposeful growth. These forward-looking organizations are driving change across sectors by embracing cutting-edge technologies, sustainable practices, customer-centric approaches, and disruptive business models. Their commitment to excellence, adaptability, and long-term impact is not only strengthening India's economic ecosystem but also enhancing its global competitiveness. This curated recognition celebrates companies that continue to push boundaries, inspire progress, and contribute significantly to shaping the future of business and innovation in India.Sungrow India Pvt. Ltd.Sunil Badesra, Country DirectorSungrow, a global leader in renewable energy technology, has pioneered sustainable power solutions for over 29 years. As of Dec 2025, Sungrow has installed over 1000 GW of power electronic converters worldwide. The company is recognized as the world's most bankable PV inverter and energy storage company (BloombergNEF). Its innovations power clean energy projects across the globe, supported by a network of 520 service outlets guaranteeing excellent customer experiences. At Sungrow, we're committed to bridging to a sustainable future through cutting-edge technology and unparalleled service. Since its establishment in 1997, the Company has been concentrating on the field of new energy power generation, adhering to market demand orientation, and taking technological innovation as the propellant for development. The company has cultivated a professional R&D team with solid R&D experiences and strong capabilities for independent innovation.LocatR.ai Hemant Agarwal, FounderBuilding the Intelligence Layer for Modern LogisticsLocatR.ai is an AI-powered logistics intelligence platform transforming how businesses manage fleets, field operations, and last-mile delivery. Founded by Hemant Agarwal, the company combines transport management, workforce tracking, computer vision, IoT, and real-time analytics into a unified operating system that delivers complete visibility across assets, orders, and personnel.Built for India’s operating realities, LocatR.ai performs reliably even in low-bandwidth environments, enabling seamless execution across complex logistics networks. Its defining innovation is “ground-truth intelligence” - validating operational events through verifiable, data-backed evidence rather than simply tracking movement.Trusted by enterprises including Exide Industries, Meesho, Flipkart, ElasticRun, and LoadShare, the platform has helped reduce return-related losses by over 80% while cutting dispute resolution times from months to less than an hour. By turning operational data into actionable intelligence, LocatR.ai is helping build a more transparent, accountable, and efficient logistics ecosystem.MiBOT Ventures India Pvt. Ltd.Vivek Dilip, CEOMiBOT is building a hardware-agnostic embodied AI platform for real-time safety, surveillance, inspection, and compliance intelligence across high-risk enterprise environments like Construction, Oil & Gas, Power, Manufacturing, Airports & Ports.MiBOT's platform integrates seamlessly with existing CCTV infrastructure and Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs). MiBOT is the first company in the world to  to detect 100+ safety, operational, compliance, and surveillance anomalies in real time.Bizwin Solutions Pvt. Ltd.Aurijit Ganguli, Managing DirectorMost B2B companies have strong offerings and credible delivery. What holds them back is the sales system built around them.Bizwin transforms that system to deliver predictable revenue for its B2B clients across IT, Manufacturing, and Professional Services industries.What make Bizwin genuinely innovative are its proprietary SAGE framework and ADVICE methodology.  Leveraging these, Bizwin embeds senior practitioners — averaging 30+ years global sales experience— directly inside client sales teams. The result is a structured, self-sustaining revenue engine, not a consultant's report.The outcomes are real and measurable: 30–60% revenue growth within 12 months, proposal win rates improvement from 20% to 40% in 5 months, and many more.Equally interesting is Bizwin’s commercial model. It charges 1% success fee on incremental revenue generated – one of the few consulting companies in the world that stakes its fee on the client's growth.BuildingWorld.aiMukesh Dhirajlal & Daksha Mukesh, DirectorsIndia’s construction and interiors sector is worth more than ₹3 lakh crore annually, yet homeowners still struggle to bridge the gap between inspiration and execution. BuildingWorld.ai was created to solve that problem.Founded in 2022, the AI-powered visual commerce platform enables users to visualize spaces, identify materials from images, discover design ideas, source products, and connect with verified suppliers and professionals—all within a single ecosystem. Powered by six proprietary in-house AI tools trained on Indian design data, the platform is building digital infrastructure for the country’s-built environment.Ahead of launch, BuildingWorld.ai has aggregated 77,500+ products, 19,000+ curated design inspirations, 4,200+ brands, 83,600+ dealers, and 6,600+ professionals, creating one of India’s largest design-to-procurement networks.The company is jointly led by architect Mukesh Dhirajlal, Daksha Mukesh and Nikita Gandhi, combining decades of industry expertise with a shared vision to transform how India designs, sources, and builds. BurgrillShreh Madan, Co-founder & CMO Founded in 2016, Burgrill has grown into one of India’s leading homegrown QSR burger brands with 70+ outlets across the country. As the OGs of grilled burgers in India, we set out to prove that fast food can be both delicious and better for you.Long before protein became a mainstream conversation, Burgrill was building its menu around high-protein, wholesome ingredients. From grilled burgers and spinach tortilla wraps to an entire range of healthy bowls, we’ve consistently offered better alternatives without compromising on taste.Positioned in the mass-premium segment, Burgrill combines quality, affordability, and innovation to cater to the evolving Indian consumer palette. With a grilling-first vision, centralized quality control, and a commitment to mindful eating, Burgrill continues to redefine what modern QSR dining can look like in India.iOTA Infotech Pvt. Ltd.Rahul Layal,Founder & CEOCreativity was an afterthought in North India’s creative landscape, until the emergence of iOTA - A Creative Agency founded by Rahul Layal with the ethos that world-class work did not need a metropolitan address, it can be built from anywhere, even a Tier-2 City. iOTA has since evolved into a global creative company with 150+ members across the world, delivering genre-defining work across India, North America, Dubai and the Gulf region. The company invests heavily in R&D and emerging technology, weaving AI into its creative and growth workflows to stay ahead of where brands are headed next. The agency has worked with legacy brands and industry juggernauts like Reckitt, Tata 1mg, Konica Minolta, Pepsi, Wendy’s, XYXX, Milton, CK12, Muviq and YouTube to name a few. iOTA boasts a decorated portfolio of 40+ awards & titles, courtesy of its great work and its inclusive & progressive work-culture, which is reflected through their remarkable client & team retention and their widely beloved social media presence.AASOKAMonica Malhotra Kandhari, MDAASOKA is a comprehensive blended learning solution that provides a customised curriculum solution for K-12. AASOKA works with schools to provide them with the tools and services needed to upgrade both administrative and teaching-learning processes. The NEP 2020 and NCF-aligned model curriculum ensures interactive, engaging learning experiences for the 21st-century learners. Catering to CBSE, ICSE, and various state boards, AASOKA has partnered with 5,500+ schools, benefiting over 10,00,000 students and training 80,000+ teachers annually.AASOKA also offers AASOKA WizKids and AI STEAM Lab for students aged 4+ and 8+, respectively. WizKids builds foundational literacy, numeracy, and computational thinking through interactive activities and a screenless coding bot, while AI STEAM Lab promotes hands-on learning, creativity, and problem-solving across Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics (STEAM).AASOKA was ranked no.1 in the World’s Top EdTech Rising Stars of 2025 by TIME and Statista.Mad Result  Abhishek Karnik, Founder  In 2019, when Abhishek Karnik started Mad Result from a small Mumbai setup, it was based on one simple belief of how marketing should be defined in terms of revenue rather than vanity matrix. That belief, seven years ago, has since turned into one of the fastest-growing performance marketing agencies in India.The numbers reveal the narrative of growth. Mad Result scaled from its initial clients to 200+ brands across real estate, BFSI, and e-commerce, managing ₹34 crore+ in ad spends, delivering 200 million+ impressions over 3,000+ campaigns with over ₹150 crore collective client revenue. Its journey from owning a steady 6x ROI to being acclaimed as one of the best performance marketing companies in Mumbai has been legendary."We grew by obsessing over outcomes clients could bank, not just clicks," says Abhishek Karnik, Founder of Mad Result.The next chapter has already begun.Capstone People ConsultingDr Sujaya Banerjee, CEODr Sujaya Banerjee, CEO Capstone People Consulting (Mumbai, Singapore) - is a much-admired Global Expert Educator in the Leadership and Culture space. She is associated with influencing leading organizations across the Globe through Duke Corporate Education and is a post Merger and Acquisition Integration Expert - Redefining Leadership, Culture Transformation and the Future of Work organizations across the world.In an era shaped by disruption, change and evolving workforce aspirations, Dr Sujaya stands out as one of Asia’s most influential voices in Leadership and Culture Transformation and is also a prominent Woman Leadership Thought Leader.Dr Banerjee has built a purpose-driven Consulting powerhouse that partners with 300 plus  leading organizations globally, regularly manifests reviews of 5/5 and has an NPS of 100. Under her leadership, Capstone is recognised for its Innovative solutions in the areas of Workplace Culture, Leadership Capability-Building, Executive Coaching, DEI and High-Performance transformation. Recognized as Forbes Most Valued Companies for 2025, Siliconindia’s Best OD & Leadership Development 2025, Top 10 Women to Follow in 2026, Dr Sujaya continues to redefine modern leadership, proving that organizations shaping the future are those that put People at the heart of transformation.The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.

title: Summer vacations in Kashmir schools from July 6 to 19: DSEK
description:
Srinagar, June 30: The Jammu and Kashmir government has decided to announce the summer vacations for Kashmir schools from July 6 to 19 of 2026.
Talking to Greater Kashmir, Director School Education Kashmir (DSEK) Naseer Ahmad Wani said the proposal has been approved and order will be issued as well.
"The proposal submitted by the Directorate has been approved by the Administrative Department. Official order will be issued as well," Wani told Greater Kashmir.
Earlier, Minister for Education Sakina Itoo said that the summer vacations will be announced from the second week of July.
"We have planned to announce the vacation from July second week but the date has not been finalized yet," she had told Greater Kashmir.

title: ലോകകിരീടം ലക്ഷ്യമിട്ട് ഫ്രഞ്ച് പട നോക്കൗട്ട് മത്സരത്തിന് ഇറങ്ങുന്നു; വിജയപ്രതീക്ഷയുമായി സ്വീഡനും
description: ലോകകപ്പ് നോക്കൗട്ട് മത്സരത്തിൽ ഫ്രാൻസ് ഇന്ന് സ്വീഡനെ നേരിടും. ഗ്രൂപ്പ് ചാമ്പ്യന്മാരായി മികച്ച ഫോമിലാണ് ഫ്രാൻസ് എത്തുന്നത്. എംബാപെ, ഡെംബലെ എന്നിവർ ടീമിന് കരുത്താകുമ്പോൾ, കടുത്ത ഗ്രൂപ്പ് ഘട്ടം കടന്നെത്തുന്ന സ്വീഡന്റെ പ്രതീക്ഷ സൂപ്പർതാരം അലക്‌സാണ്ടർ ഇസാക്കിലാണ്.
content: <p>ന്യൂജഴ്‌സി: ലോകകിരീടം ലക്ഷ്യമിട്ട് ഫ്രാൻസ് ഇന്ന് സ്വീഡനുമായുള്ള നോക്കൗട്ട് മത്സരത്തിനിറങ്ങുന്നു. ഗ്രൂപ്പ് ചാമ്പ്യാന്മാരായി എത്തുന്ന ഫ്രാൻസ് മികച്ച ഫോമിലാണ്. സെനഗൽ, ഇറാഖ്, നോർവേ എന്നീ ടീമുകളെ ഗ്രൂപ്പ് മത്സരങ്ങളിൽ തോല്പിയ്ച്ചതിന്റെ ആത്മവിശ്വാസവുമായാണ് ഫ്രാൻസ് ഇറങ്ങുന്നത്. ഇന്നത്തെ മത്സരത്തിൽ മികച്ച മാർജിനിൽ ജയിച്ച് പ്രീ ക്വാർട്ടർ ഉറപ്പിക്കാൻ തന്നെയാണ് ഫ്രാൻസിന്റെ വരവ്. എംബാപെയുടെയും ഡംബെലെയുടെയും ഒലീസേയുടെയും മിന്നും ഫോം ആണ് ഫ്രാൻസിന്റെ കരുത്ത്.</p><p>അതേസമയം കടുപ്പമേറിയ ഗ്രൂപ്പ് ഘട്ടം കഴിഞ്ഞാണ് സ്വീഡൻ എത്തുന്നത്. നെതർലൻഡ്സിനോട് ആദ്യ മാത്രത്തിൽ വലിയ മാർജിനിൽ തോൽവി ഏറ്റുവാങ്ങിയെങ്കിലും ട്യുണീഷ്യയോട് വിജയിക്കുകയും ജപ്പാനെ സമനിലയിൽ തളച്ചുമാണ് സ്വീഡൻ എത്തുന്നത്. സൂപ്പർതാരം അലക്‌സാണ്ടർ ഇസാക്കിന്റെ മികച്ച ഫോം ആണ് സ്വീഡന്റെ കരുത്ത്. കഴിഞ്ഞ ലോകകപ്പിൽ ക്വാർട്ടറിൽ ഇംഗ്ളണ്ടിനോട് തോൽവി ഏറ്റുവാങ്ങിയായിരുന്നു സ്വീഡൻ പുറത്തുപോയത്.</p><p>അതേസമയം ഗോൾഡൻ ബൂട്ടിനുള്ള പോരാട്ടത്തിൽ എംബാപെ ഇന്ന് മെസിയെ മറികടക്കുമോ എന്നും ആരാധകർ ഉറ്റുനോക്കുന്ന കാര്യമാണ്. മൂന്ന് കളികളിൽ നാല് ഗോളുകളാണ് എംബാപെയുടെ സമ്പാദ്യം. കൂടാതെ രണ്ട് അസിസ്റ്റുകളും താരത്തിന്റേതായുണ്ട്. എംബാപെ മിന്നും പ്രകടനത്തിനൊപ്പം ഉസ്മാൻ ഡെമ്പലെയും മൈക്കിൾ ഒലിസെയും മികച്ച ഫോമിൽ തുടരുന്നത് ഫ്രാൻസിനെ സംബന്ധിച്ച് ആത്മവിശ്വാസം പകരുന്നതാണ്. നാളെ പുലർച്ചെ 2.30 നാണ് മത്സരം.</p><p></p>

title: Finance Ministry Monthly Economic Review: India's macroeconomic stability intact, external risks ease - Full details inside
description: Finance Ministry Monthly Economic Review: India's macroeconomic stability intact, external risks ease
content: Finance Ministry Monthly Economic Review: The Finance Ministry has expressed confidence in India’s economic fundamentals, stating that macroeconomic stability remains intact while external sector concerns are easing.In its latest Monthly Economic Review, the Finance Ministry noted that India’s overall macroeconomic position continues to be resilient despite global headwinds. The report particularly highlighted improving external sector dynamics.The ministry said inflation is likely to remain contained in the coming months, supported by favourable monsoon prospects and steady domestic supply conditions.The review stated, "India's macroeconomic stability holds; external concerns ease."It also discussed positive trends regarding foreign debt investors and equity flows, indicating improving sentiment among overseas investors.The Finance Ministry’s assessment comes at a time when India is navigating a mix of strong domestic growth drivers and global uncertainties. The report reinforces optimism around the country’s economic resilience, particularly on the external front, even as it continues to monitor inflation and global risks closely.

title: AI is minting billion-dollar companies faster than before
description: One in five European startups now hit a $1 billion valuation within two years, as AI reshapes who builds, and how fast.
content:
Welcome to Eye on AI.  AI reporter Beatrice Nolan here. In today’s issue:




AI is reshaping who builds, and how fast.



The U.S. government allows the limited release of Anthropic’s Mythos model.



AI isn’t killing jobs—yet. 



And California cuts a deal with Anthropic—despite tensions in DC.




The big news from the weekend is that Anthropic’s Mythos AI model is back—but only for a few.



On Friday, the Trump administration lifted its two-week block on Anthropic’s Mythos 5 model, clearing it for release to more than 100 U.S. institutions, including major companies and government agencies. Fable 5, the public-facing version of the same model family, remains blocked, with talks over its reinstatement ongoing.



Also on Friday, OpenAI got the Anthropic treatment (well, sort of, anyway) over its newest model. The Trump administration asked OpenAI to limit the release of its GPT-5.6 lineup—comprising three models, Sol, Terra, and Luna—to a small group of government-approved partners, citing the models’ advanced cybersecurity capabilities. OpenAI complied while making clear it does not believe “this kind of government access process should become the long-term default.”



We have the full rundown of the news from this week below, but first: AI is fundamentally reshaping who builds billion-dollar companies, and how fast.



AI is accelerating how quickly companies reach unicorn status



The scale of the AI funding boom has been producing numbers that would have seemed fictional five years ago.



Last month, Anthropic, founded in 2021, became the most valuable private company in history after it raised $65 billion at a $965 billion valuation in May, overtaking OpenAI, which had itself closed a $122 billion round at $852 billion just weeks earlier. 



New analysis from venture capital firm Accel, produced in partnership with Dealroom and Revelio Labs and shared with Fortune exclusively, shows that Europe is seeing the same unprecedented speed play out at the startup level.



Of the 86 new unicorns minted in Europe and Israel from 2023 onwards, 20% reached a $1 billion valuation (the threshold for unicorn status) within two years of founding, up from just 5% before the generative AI era. Nearly a third got there in three years or less, against 12% previously. The total number of these ultrafast unicorns has also quadrupled since 2023.



Part of what is driving that speed, according to Matt Robinson, a partner at Accel and co-founder of GoCardless, is that AI is a general-purpose technology—one that can be dropped into almost any sector and immediately create value.



Because the value is clearer, sales cycle times collapse, deal sizes grow, and the time between funding rounds shrinks, he said. In AI, the first company to meaningfully address a given market—whether legal, coding, customer support, or dozens of other verticals—tends to lock in that position, becoming the dominant player others then have to compete against. The window to do that is short, and it is open everywhere at once, which is why the pressure on founders to move fast is so intense, he added.



Another reason companies are moving so much faster in the AI age: they are using their own tech. AI—well implemented— can also mean smaller teams and less overhead, allowing companies to scale faster.



Zhenya Loginov, also a partner at Accel, described the ideal founder in the AI age as a “tinkerer”—someone who is constantly testing new tools, aware of everything emerging, and making sure their whole team operates at the same level. Robinson said the best founding teams are also building on top of the tools—running multiple coding agents at once, automating sales outreach and marketing, and compressing internally what used to take months of engineering time into days.



According to Anton Osika, co-founder and CEO of Lovable, which reached $500 million in annual recurring revenue faster than any European tech company before it, said AI has made it possible for anyone to participate in the software economy in a way that was previously closed to them. That step change in who can build, he said, is what is driving the pace and scale of new companies.



A new kind of founder



There’s also been a shift in who is doing the building. The Accel data shows that founders of Europe’s post-2023 unicorns are twice as likely to have come from Big Tech as their predecessors—23% versus 11%—and twice as likely to hold a doctorate, at 18% versus 9%. Academic founders have also doubled, from 12% to 23%. Microsoft and Alphabet have also overtaken BCG and McKinsey as the most common pipeline for founders.



Loginov said that change reflects the maturation of the European ecosystem and the arrival of large tech campuses in London, Paris, and Zurich, giving a generation of engineers experience on the global technology stage before they go off to build. 



The rise of PhD founders is also AI-driven—not because AI companies necessarily require a founder with a doctorate, but because AI has accelerated breakthroughs in robotics, cybersecurity, and autonomous software. Founders working on those frontiers tend to come from labs and universities, and the markets they are opening can be very large, the report said.



Osika said he’s noticed that Big Tech talent is also actively moving to Europe to join companies, including his own. “It’s clear that a lot of top talent is moving here,” he told Fortune, adding that the inflow was proof that category-defining companies could be built on this side of the Atlantic—not just in the US, where most of them have historically come from.



With that, here’s more AI news. 



Beatrice Nolanbeatrice.nolan@fortune.com@beafreyanolan




This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: Trump's plan to redesign every .gov website leads to AI-designed horrors
description: A year in, National Design Studio delays plan to update government web standards.
content:
President Donald Trump’s plan to “fill the digital potholes” and use AI to quickly redesign every government website isn’t going very well.
Last August, Trump created the National Design Studio, or NDS, by executive order. A temporary DOGE-like entity that answers only to the president, NDS was tasked with creating new standards to update the US Web Design System (USWDS) and overhaul 27,000 dot-gov websites in just three years. At the end of this so-called “America by Design” initiative, the government’s “design language” would supposedly be more usable and beautiful, Trump expected.
However, that monumental task—assigned to a small team under a short timeframe—was seemingly made harder by DOGE's deep cuts to agencies previously responsible for improving government websites, including dismantling the 18F technology unit and restructuring the US Digital Service into DOGE.Read full article

title: छत्रपति संभाजीनगर में नई जलापूर्ति योजना से पानी आया, लेकिन कमजोर पाइपलाइन नेटवर्क होने से नहीं मिला पूरा लाभ
description: Sambhajinagar Water Distribution Challenge:नई जलापूर्ति योजना से साढ़े तीन माह में 800 MLD पानी शहर तक पहुंचा, पर कमजोर वितरण नेटवर्क के कारण छत्रपति संभाजीनगर के नागरिकों को पूरा लाभ नहीं मिल रहा।
content:
Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Water Distribution Challenge: शहर की नई जलापूर्ति योजना के तहत पिछले साढ़े तीन महीनों में लगभग 800 एमएलडी पानी शहर तक पहुंचाया गया है। इसके बावजूद शहरवासियों को नियमित और पर्याप्त जलापूर्ति का लाभ नहीं मिल पा रहा है, क्योंकि मनपा के पास पानी के प्रभावी वितरण के लिए पर्याप्त व्यवस्था उपलब्ध नहीं है। इसके कारण जलापूर्ति के अंतराल में अब तक अपेक्षित कमी नहीं आ सकी है।
योजना की क्षमता बढ़ी पर वितरण व्यवस्था अब भी कमजोर
नई जलापूर्ति योजना के तहत शहर को प्रतिदिन 392 एमएलडी पानी उपलब्ध कराने का लक्ष्य निर्धारित किया गया है। फिलहाल पहले चरण में 200 एमएलडी पानी उपलब्ध कराने के लिए महाराष्ट्र जीवन प्राधिकरण (एमजेपी) द्वारा लगातार प्रयास किए जा रहे हैं। इस योजना के अंतर्गत 19 मार्च 2026 से जायकवाड़ी बांध से पानी उठाने की प्रक्रिया शुरू की गई थी।
परीक्षण सफल होने के बाद मुख्य पाइपलाइन की सफाई, जल शोधन केंद्र, पंपगृह और अन्य तकनीकी कार्य पूरे करते हुए नियमित जलापूर्ति शुरू कर दी गई। योजना के अनुसार जायकवाड़ी बांध से सायफन प्रणाली के माध्यम से पानी नक्षत्रवाड़ी स्थित जल शोधन केंद्र तक पहुंचाया जा रहा है।
हालांकि, वहां से शहर के विभिन्न क्षेत्रों में पानी पहुंचाने के लिए महानगरपालिका का वितरण नेटवर्क अभी पर्याप्त रूप से विकसित नहीं हो सका है। इसी कारण पर्याप्त मात्रा में पानी उपलब्ध होने के बावजूद नागरिकों को नई जलापूर्ति योजना का अपेक्षित लाभ नहीं मिल पा रहा है।
यह भी पढ़ेः-  संभाजीनगर के लिटिल फ्लावर स्कूल में TC लेने आया नाबालिग छात्र ने शिक्षक पर किए ताबड़तोड़ चाकू से हमला 
वितरण व्यवस्था मजबूत होने पर सुधरेगी जलापूर्ति
सूत्रों के अनुसार, जायकवाड़ी से पानी पहुंचाने के लिए अपनाई गई सायफन प्रणाली महाराष्ट्र के सातारा, सोलापुर और कोल्हापुर जैसे शहरों में पहले से सफलतापूर्वक कार्य कर रही है। इन शहरों में इस तकनीक के माध्यम से नियमित और प्रभावी जलापूर्ति सुनिश्चित की जा रही है।
अधिकारियों का मानना है कि छत्रपति संभाजीनगर में भी यह प्रणाली तकनीकी रूप से सक्षम है और मुख्य चुनौती केवल वितरण नेटवर्क की है। जैसे ही महानगरपालिका शहर के भीतर पाइपलाइन और वितरण व्यवस्था को मजबूत करेगी, वैसे ही नागरिकों को नियमित अंतराल पर अधिक मात्रा में पानी उपलब्ध कराया जा सकेगा और जलापूर्ति व्यवस्था में उल्लेखनीय सुधार देखने को मिलेगा।
– नवभारत लाइव के लिए छत्रपति संभाजीनगर से शफीउल्ला हुसैनी की रिपोर्ट

title: ദേശീയപാത 66ൽ യാത്രക്കാരിൽ ആശങ്കയായി ഗർത്തം, 12 അടിയോളം താഴ്ചയിൽ റോഡ് താഴ്ന്നുപോയി
description: ദേശീയപാത 66-ൽ ചേർത്തല പതിനൊന്നാം മൈൽ മേൽപ്പാലത്തിൽ വാഹനങ്ങൾ കടന്നുപോയതിന് പിന്നാലെ വലിയ ഗർത്തം രൂപപ്പെട്ടു.
content: <p><strong>ആലപ്പുഴ :</strong> ദേശീയപാത 66-ൽ ചേർത്തല പതിനൊന്നാം മൈൽ മേൽപ്പാലത്തിൽ ഗർത്തം രൂപപ്പെട്ടത് യാത്രക്കാരിൽ ആശങ്കയ്ക്ക് ഇടയാക്കി. വൈകിട്ട് 6.30 ഓടെ യാണ് സംഭവം. മേൽപ്പാലത്തിലൂടെ വാഹനങ്ങൾ കുറച്ച് ദിവസങ്ങളായി കടന്നു പോകുന്നുണ്ട്. സൂപ്പർ ഫാസ്റ്റും കാറും കടന്നുപോയതിൻ്റെ പിന്നാലെയാണ് 12 അടി യോളം താഴ്ചയിൽ റോഡ് താഴന്ന് പോയത്. കഴിഞ്ഞ ദിവസങ്ങളിലുണ്ടായ ശക്തമായ മഴയെ തുടർന്നാണ് പാലത്തിന്റെ റോഡ് ഉപരിതലത്തിൽ ഗർത്തം രൂപപ്പെട്ടതെന്നാണ് പ്രാഥമിക വിലയിരുത്തൽ. ഗർത്തം ശ്രദ്ധയിൽപ്പെട്ടതോടെ വാഹനയാത്രക്കാരും സമീപ പ്രദേശത്തെ ഓട്ടോ ഡ്രൈവർമ്മാരും അധികൃതരെ വിവരം അറിയിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു.&nbsp;</p><p>ദേശീയപാത അതോറിറ്റിയുടെയും ബന്ധപ്പെട്ട കരാർ കമ്പനികളുടെയും ഉദ്യോഗസ്ഥർ സ്ഥലത്തെത്തി പരിശോധന നടത്തി. ആവശ്യമായ അറ്റകുറ്റപ്പണികൾ പൂർത്തിയാകുന്നതുവരെ സ്ഥലത്ത് നിരീക്ഷണം തുടരുമെന്ന് അധികൃതർ അറിയിച്ചു. എന്നാൽ കുഴി കോൺക്രീറ്റ് ഉപയോഗിച്ച് അടയ്ക്കാനുള്ള ശ്രമം മാത്രമാണ് ദേശീയപാത അധികൃതരുടെ ഭാഗത്തുനിന്നും ഉണ്ടാകുന്നതെന്ന് നാട്ടുകാർ കുറ്റപ്പെടുത്തി.ആവശ്യമായ അറ്റകുറ്റപ്പണികൾ പൂർത്തിയാകുന്നതുവരെ സ്ഥലത്ത് പ്രത്യേക നിരീക്ഷണം തുടരുമെന്ന് അധികൃതർ അറിയിച്ചു. &nbsp;</p><p></p><p>&nbsp;</p>

title: ঋণাত্মক চিন্তা পৰিহাৰ কৰি ইতিবাচক মনেৰে আগবাঢ়িব লাগিব ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীঃ ড° বোধেন শইকীয়া
description:
ডিজিটেল  সংবাদ,বেবেজীয়াঃ  নগাঁও জিলাৰ বেবেজীয়াৰ সমীপৰ ডিমৌ চাৰিআলিস্থিত ঐতিহ্যমণ্ডিত শালমৰা উচ্চ মাধ্যমিক বিদ্যালয়ত এক গাম্ভীৰ্যপূৰ্ণ পৰিৱেশত ধৰ্মানন্দ গোস্বামী আৰু কৃতী ছাত্ৰী প্ৰয়াত স্মৃতিৰেখা মেধি সোঁৱৰণী শৈক্ষিক বঁটা প্ৰদানৰ লগতে কৃতি ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীসকলক এক সম্বৰ্ধনা জনোৱা হয়। অসম চৰকাৰৰ প্ৰাক্তন মীন মন্ত্ৰী উমেশ চন্দ্ৰ দাসৰ পৌৰোহিত্যত অনুষ্ঠিত এই বিশেষ সভাত মুখ্য অতিথি হিচাপে উপস্থিত থাকে কৰ্মশ্ৰী হিতেশ্বৰ শইকীয়া মহাবিদ্যালয়ৰ অধ্যক্ষ তথা বিশিষ্ট নিৱন্ধকাৰ-স্তম্ভ লেখক ড° বোধেন শইকীয়া।

বিদ্যালয়ৰ প্ৰধান শিক্ষক মাধৱ চন্দ্ৰ দাসে উদ্দেশ্য ব্যাখ্যা আৰু আদৰণি ভাষণ আগবঢ়োৱা সভাখনি সুচাৰুৰূপে আঁত ধৰে জ্যেষ্ঠ শিক্ষক দিব্যজ্যোতি শৰ্মাই। লগতে সভাত ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীসকলক উদ্দেশ্যি বক্তব্য প্ৰদান কৰি ড° বোধেন শইকীয়াই কয় যে, শিক্ষাৰ্থীসকলে সদায় ঋণাত্মক চিন্তা পৰিহাৰ কৰি ইতিবাচক মনোভাৱেৰে জীৱন যাত্ৰাত আগবাঢ়ি যাব লাগিব। ইয়াৰ লগতে বৰ্তমানৰ ৰাজহুৱা শিক্ষা ব্যৱস্থাৰ স্খলনক লৈ তেওঁ তীব্ৰ ক্ষোভ প্ৰকাশ কৰে। 
ড° শইকীয়াই কয়, "আজিৰ তাৰিখত ৰাজহুৱা বা চৰকাৰী শিক্ষাৰ মানদণ্ড নিম্নগামী হোৱাৰ বাবে প্ৰথমতে আমি নিজে দায়ী। তাৰ পিছত জাতীয় জীৱনৰ ত্ৰাণকৰ্তা বুলি আত্মপ্ৰবঞ্চনা কৰি থকা দল-সংগঠনবোৰ আৰু আমাৰ চৰকাৰ দায়ী।"
আনফালে, এই অনুষ্ঠানতে চলিত বৰ্ষৰ হাইস্কুল শিক্ষান্ত পৰীক্ষাত সুখ্যাতিৰে উত্তীৰ্ণ হোৱা বিদ্যালয়খনৰ কৃতী ছাত্ৰ বহ্নিমান ডেকাক ধৰ্মানন্দ গোস্বামী আৰু স্মৃতিৰেখা মেধি সোঁৱৰণী শৈক্ষিক বঁটা প্ৰদান কৰা হয়। এই বঁটাত ছাত্ৰগৰাকীক এখন সম্বৰ্ধনা পত্ৰ, গ্ৰন্থৰ টোপোলা আৰু নগদ ধন আগবঢ়োৱা হয়। ইয়াৰ উপৰি, চলিত বৰ্ষৰ মেট্ৰিক পৰীক্ষাত সুখ্যাতিৰে উত্তীৰ্ণ হোৱা আন আন শিক্ষাৰ্থীসকলৰ লগতে বিদ্যালয়খনৰ ষষ্ঠ শ্ৰেণীৰ পৰা দশম শ্ৰেণীলৈকে বাৰ্ষিক পৰীক্ষাসমূহত সৰ্বোচ্চ নম্বৰ প্ৰাপক ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীসকলকো বিশেষভাৱে সম্বৰ্ধনা জ্ঞাপন কৰা হয়।

সভাত প্ৰাক্তন প্ৰধান শিক্ষয়িত্ৰী ইৰালতা মেধি আৰু প্ৰাক্তন প্ৰধান শিক্ষক খগেন মুক্তিয়াৰে ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীসকলক উদ্দেশ্যি বহুমূলীয়া পৰামৰ্শমূলক ভাষণ আগবঢ়ায়। অনুষ্ঠানত অৱসৰপ্ৰাপ্ত শিক্ষক নিৰ্মল শইকীয়া, ললিত ডেকা, প্ৰবীণ ৰাজা, প্ৰদীপ চন্দ্ৰ দাস, জীতেন দাস, পৰমানন্দ হাজৰিকা, জ্যোতিপ্ৰসাদ ডেকা, পৰমানন্দ দাস, অৱসৰপ্ৰাপ্ত শিক্ষয়িত্ৰী ৰীতা হাজৰিকা, শালমৰা গাঁৱ পঞ্চায়তৰ প্ৰাক্তন সভানেত্ৰী ববিতা মেধিকে ধৰি বিদ্যালয়ৰ শিক্ষক-শিক্ষয়িত্ৰী, অভিভাৱক আৰু স্থানীয় ৰাইজ উপস্থিত থাকে।

title: Judgement: ବିଳମ୍ବରେ ଆବେଦନ ଦାଖଲ, ୧ ଲକ୍ଷ ଟଙ୍କା ତଣ୍ଡ ଗଣିବେ ସରକାର
UP Police का सिपाही बना ‘मोहम्मद हारिस’, हनीट्रैप और धर्मांतरण के इस खौफनाक खेल ने उड़ाए सरकार के होश- VIDEO
description: UP Police Honeytrap: UP Police के सिपाही को हनीट्रैप में फंसाकर जबरन धर्मांतरण कराने का सनसनीखेज मामला सामने आया है। हाशिम बाबा गैंग की साजिश का शिकार हुआ सिपाही मदद की गुहार लगा रहा।
content:
Baghpat Cop Conversion: उत्तर प्रदेश के बागपत में तैनात यूपी पुलिस के सिपाही श्रीकांत गौतम को लेकर एक बेहद चौंकाने वाला मामला सामने आया है। दिल्ली के कुख्यात &#8216;हाशिम बाबा गैंग&#8217; की गतिविधियों की जांच और साक्ष्य जुटाने के लिए तैनात किए गए इस सिपाही को सोची-समझी साजिश के तहत हनीट्रैप में फंसाया गया। जब गैंग को भनक लगी कि सिपाही उनके पीछे है, तो एक महिला के जरिए उसे जाल में फंसाकर उसका ब्रेनवाश किया गया और जबरन उसका धर्मांतरण कराकर नाम &#8216;मोहम्मद हारिस&#8217; रख दिया गया। उसको प्रताड़ित किया गया।
प्रताड़ना के दौरान उसे बीफ खिलाने और जबरन खतना कराने की कोशिश भी की गई। जब सिपाही ने अधिकारियों से न्याय की गुहार लगाई, तो कथित तौर पर बागपत के तत्कालीन एसपी सूरज राय ने मौलानाओं से मोटी रकम लेकर उन्हें क्लीन चिट दे दी और पीड़ित सिपाही पर ही 376 का केस दर्ज करवाकर उसे निलंबित कर दिया। अब हिंदूवादी संगठन सिपाही के समर्थन में उतर आए हैं और मुख्यमंत्री योगी आदित्यनाथ से न्याय की मांग कर रहे हैं।

title: McLaren reveal VERY different British GP livery in 60-year tribute

title: പ്രതിഷേധം ഫലം കണ്ടു, ദി ടെലഗ്രാഫ് മുൻ എഡിറ്റർ ആർ രാജഗോപാലിന് പാസ്പോർട്ട് പുതുക്കി നൽകും
description: ദി ടെലഗ്രാഫ് മുൻ എഡിറ്റർ ആർ രാജഗോപാലിന് പാസ്പോർട്ട് പുതുക്കി നൽകാൻ തീരുമാനമായി. എസ്ഐആറിൽ പേര് വെട്ടിയതിനെ തുടർന്ന് തടസ്സപ്പെട്ട വെരിഫിക്കേഷൻ, പ്രതിഷേധങ്ങളെ തുടർന്ന് കൊൽക്കത്ത പോലീസ് പുതിയ റിപ്പോർട്ട് സമർപ്പിച്ചതോടെയാണ് പുനരാരംഭിച്ചത്.
content: <p>ദില്ലി : ദി ടെലഗ്രാഫ് മുൻ എഡിറ്റർ ആർ രാജഗോപാലിന് പാസ്പോർട്ട് പുതുക്കി നൽകാൻ തീരുമാനമായി. ഇത് സംബന്ധിച്ച് അറിയിപ്പ് ലഭിച്ചു. എസ്ഐആറിൽ പേര് വെട്ടിയതിന് പിന്നാലെ പാസ്പോർട്ട് വെരിഫിക്കേഷൻ നടന്നിരുന്നില്ല. സംഭവത്തിൽ വലിയ പ്രതിഷേധമുയർന്നതോടെയാണ് തീരുമാനം. സംഭവത്തിൽ പശ്ചിമബംഗാൾ സർക്കാർ മൗനം പാലിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു. ഇതോടെ വലിയ രീതിയിൽ പ്രതിഷേധമുയരുകയായിരുന്നു. ഇതോടെ കൊൽക്കത്ത പോലീസ് പുതിയ റിപ്പോർട്ട് സമർപ്പിച്ചു. പാസ്പോർട്ട് പ്രിന്റിംഗ് തുടങ്ങാനുള്ള നടപടി ആരംഭിച്ചതായാണ് വിവരം.&nbsp;</p><p>മാര്‍ച്ച് 27നാണ് എസ്‌ഐ ആറിന്റെ നടപടിക്കിടെ ആർ രാജഗോപാലിന്റെ പേര് വെട്ടിയവിവരം തെര. കമ്മീഷൻ അധികൃതർ അറിയിച്ചത്. ഇതിന് മുൻപ് ഫെബ്രുവരി 27ന് പാസ്‌പോര്‍ട്ട് പുതുക്കാന്‍ അപേക്ഷ നല്‍കിയിരുന്നു. വെരിഫിക്കേഷനായി പൊലീസ് സ്റ്റേഷനിൽ നിന്ന് വിളിച്ചപ്പോൾ എസ്ഐആറിൽ പേര് വെട്ടിയ വിവരവും അപ്പീൽ നൽകിയ കാര്യവും പൊലീസിനെ രാജഗോപാൽ അറിയിച്ചു. പാൻകാർഡ് അടക്കം മറ്റ് രേഖകളും സമർപ്പിച്ചു. പേര് എസ്‌ഐആറില്‍ നിന്ന് നീക്കം ചെയ്തതിനാല്‍ പൊലീസ് വേരിഫിക്കേഷന് സാധ്യമല്ലെന്ന് പിന്നീട് പൊലീസ് അറിയിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു.&nbsp;</p>

title: Yadagirigutta | యాదగిరిగుట్ట దేవస్థానం ట్రస్ట్ బోర్డు చైర్మన్‌గా ఎం.సత్యనారాయణ రెడ్డి..!
description: Yadagirigutta : యాదగిరి గుట్ట దేవస్థానం ట్రస్ట్ బోర్డు చైర్మన్‌గా మన్నె సత్యనారాయణ రెడ్డి నియమితులయ్యారు.  సత్యనారాయణ రెడ్డికి ట్రస్ట్ బోర్డు చైర్మన్‌ బాధ్యతలు అప్పగిస్తూ మంగళవారం ప్రభుత్వ ప్రధాన కార్యదర్శి శైలజా రామయ్యర్ ఉత్తర్వులు జారీ చేశారు.
content:
Yadagirigutta : యాదగిరిగుట్ట దేవస్థానం ట్రస్ట్ బోర్డు చైర్మన్‌గా మన్నె సత్యనారాయణ రెడ్డి నియమితులయ్యారు. ఎంఎస్‌ఎన్ గ్రూప్ చైర్మన్ అయిన సత్యనారాయణ రెడ్డికి ట్రస్ట్ బోర్డు చైర్మన్‌ బాధ్యతలు అప్పగిస్తూ మంగళవారం ప్రభుత్వ ప్రధాన కార్యదర్శి శైలజా రామయ్యర్ ఉత్తర్వులు జారీ చేశారు. అలానే 10 మంది బోర్డు సభ్యులను, ఏడుగురు ఎక్స్ అఫీషియో సభ్యుల పేర్లను వెల్లడించారు.
యాదగిరిగుట్ట దేవస్థానం ట్రస్ట్ బోర్డు సభ్యులుగా ఎమ్మెల్యే వినోద్ వెంకటస్వామి, కొణిదల సురేఖ, చిలప్పగారి విజయరాజం, విజయేందర్ తుల్ల, పోచబోయిన ఈశ్వరమ్మ యాదవ్, గుండు మల్లయ్య, స్వాతి కంఠమని, ఎం. రాఘవేంద్ర రావు, డి. లక్మీనారాయణ నాయక్, ట్రస్టీ వ్యవస్థాపకులు నియమితులయ్యారు.
Ygt Trust Board
ప్రభుత్వ ప్రధాన, రెవెన్యూ, దేవాదాయ శాఖ కార్యదర్శి.. తెలంగాణ ప్రభుత్వం దేవాదాయ శాఖ కమిషనర్, యాదాద్రి భువనగిరి జిల్లా కలెక్టర్, వైటీడీఏ వైస్ చైర్మన్, యాదగిరిగుట్ట దేవస్థానం ఎగ్జిక్యూటివ్ అధికారి, స్థానాచార్యులు లేదా.. సీనియర్ ప్రధాన అర్చకులు ఎక్స్ అఫీషియో సభ్యులుగా వ్యవహరించనున్నారు.

title: 'എന്നെ ദ്രോഹിക്കല്ലേ..ഞാൻ സുവിശേഷക ആകും'; രോ​ഗക്കിടക്കയിൽ നിന്നും രേണു സുധി
description: കോട്ടയം മെഡിക്കൽ കോളേജിൽ ചികിത്സയിലുള്ള രേണു സുധി, രോഗം ഭേദമായാൽ ദൈവത്തിന് സാക്ഷ്യം പറഞ്ഞ് ഒരു സുവിശേഷകയാകാൻ ആഗ്രഹിക്കുന്നുവെന്ന് പറഞ്ഞു. ഇനിയെങ്കിലും ദ്രോഹിക്കരുതെന്നും രേണു അഭ്യർത്ഥിച്ചു.
content: <p><strong>ക</strong>ഴി‍ഞ്ഞ മൂന്ന് വർഷമായി സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിൽ ഏറ്റവും കൂടുതൽ ട്രോളുകളും വിമർശനങ്ങളും നേരിട്ട വ്യക്തിയാണ് രേണു സുധി. ഇന്ന് അവർക്ക് വേണ്ടി നിരവധി പേരാണ് പ്രാർത്ഥനകളും ആശ്വാസവാക്കുകളുമായി രം​ഗത്ത് എത്തുന്നത്. ഒരുകാലത്ത് രേണുവിനെ പരിഹസിച്ചവർ തന്നെയാണ് ഇക്കൂട്ടത്തിലേറെയും എന്നതിൽ തർക്കമില്ല. കാൻസറിനോടുള്ള പോരാട്ടത്തിനിടയിൽ ലഭിക്കുന്ന അവസരങ്ങളിൽ രേണു സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിൽ സജീവമാകാറുണ്ട്. വീഡിയോകളും അവർ പങ്കിടുന്നുണ്ട്. ഇപ്പോഴിതാ രോ​ഗം ഭേതമായി താൻ തിരിച്ചുവരുമ്പോൾ ഒരേയൊരു ആ​ഗ്രഹമുണ്ടെന്ന് പറയുകയാണ് രേണു സുധി.</p><p>ദൈവത്തിന്റെ സാക്ഷിയാകാനാണ് ആ​ഗ്രമെന്നും താൻ സുവിശേഷക ആകുമെന്നും രേണു സുധി പറയുന്നു. വീട്ടുകാരുടേയും തന്നെ സ്നേഹിക്കുന്നവരുടേയും പ്രാർത്ഥനകൾ ഉണ്ടെങ്കിൽ താൻ തിരിച്ച് വരുമെന്നും സാക്ഷ്യം പറയുമെന്നും രേണു പറയുന്നു. ഗുണം ചെയ്തില്ലെങ്കിലും ഇനിയെങ്കിലും എന്നെ ദ്രോഹിക്കാതിരിക്കണമെന്നും രേണു ആവശ്യപ്പെട്ടു.</p><p>'എന്‍റെ ആഗ്രഹം ഇവിടെന്ന് എഴുന്നേറ്റ് കഴിഞ്ഞാല്‍, ദൈവത്തിന്‍റെ സാക്ഷിയാകാന്‍ പോകണം. ചുരുക്കി പറഞ്ഞാല്‍ ഒരു മിഷണറി. എനിക്ക് സുവിശേഷക ആയിട്ട് പോകാനാണ് ആഗ്രഹം. ഇവിടുന്ന് എന്‍റെ ദൈവം എഴുന്നേല്‍പ്പിച്ച് കഴിഞ്ഞാല്‍, രോഗമുക്തി നേടി കഴിഞ്ഞാല്‍ ഞാനത് ചെയ്യും. എനിക്ക് കിട്ടുന്ന വര്‍ക്ക് ഒരു സൈഡിലൂടെ പോകും. പക്ഷേ പ്രധാനമായും ദൈവത്തിന് വേണ്ടിയിട്ട് എന്‍റെ അനുഭവ സാക്ഷ്യം പറയാന്‍ ആഗ്രഹമുണ്ട്. ഇപ്പോള്‍ തന്നെ സ്റ്റേജില്‍ നിന്നും പ്രസംഗിക്കുന്ന എന്നെ ഞാന്‍ കാണാറുണ്ട്. കഴിയോന്ന് അറിയില്ല. പക്ഷേ പറ്റുമെന്നൊരു പ്രത്യാശയുണ്ട്. നിങ്ങളെ പോലുള്ള നല്ല മനുഷ്യരുടെ സ്നേഹം ഉണ്ടെങ്കില്‍ ഞാന്‍ മുന്നോട്ട് പോകും. ഗുണം ചെയ്തില്ലെങ്കിലും ഇനിയെങ്കിലും എന്നെ ദ്രോഹിക്കാതിരിക്കുക. മരിക്കാന്‍ എനിക്ക് പേടിയില്ല. പക്ഷേ റിതപ്പനും വീട്ടുകാര്‍ക്കും എന്നെ സ്നേഹിക്കുന്നവര്‍ക്കും വിഷമമാകും', എന്നായിരുന്നു രേണു സുധിയുടെ വാക്കുകൾ. കോട്ടയം മെഡിക്കൽ കോളേജിലാണ് രേണുവിന്റെ ചികിത്സ നടക്കുന്നത്. രണ്ടാമത്തെ കീമോ ജൂലൈയിൽ നടക്കും.</p><p></p>

title: തിരു വീർ - ഐശ്വര്യ രാജേഷ് ചിത്രം 'ഓ സുകുമാരി' ആഗോള റിലീസ് ജൂലൈ 17 ന്
ବିଶ୍ୱକପ୍‌ରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେବା ପରେ ମୁହିଁ ଖୋଲିଲେ ଅଧିନାୟକ, କହିଲେ…
description:
ଫକ୍ସବରୋ,୩୦ା୬: କ୍ରମାଗତ ତୃତୀୟଥର ପାଇଁ ଜର୍ମାନୀ ବିଶ୍ୱକପ୍‌ର ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭିକ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେଇଛି। ଏଥର ଦଳ ପେନାଲ୍ଟି ଶୁଟ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ରେ ପାରାଗୁଏଠାରୁ ଲଜ୍ଜାଜନକ ପରାଜୟ ବରଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଆମେରିକୀୟ ଦେଶ ପାରାଗୁଏ ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟର ତୃତୀୟ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ରହି ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ରାଉଣ୍ଡକୁ ଉତ୍ତୀର୍ଣ୍ଣ ହୋଇଥିବାରୁ ଏହି ପରାଜୟକୁ ହଜମ କରିବା ଜର୍ମାନୀ ପାଇଁ ଅଧିକ କଷ୍ଟକର ହେଉଛି। ଏଥିଲାଗି ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ଖବରଦାତା ସମ୍ମିଳନୀରେ ଜର୍ମାନୀର ଅଧିନାୟକ ଜୋଶୁଆ କିମିଚ ପୂରା ଦଳକୁ ସମାଲୋଚନା କରିଛନ୍ତି। ମ୍ୟାନେଜର […]
The post ବିଶ୍ୱକପ୍‌ରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେବା ପରେ ମୁହିଁ ଖୋଲିଲେ ଅଧିନାୟକ, କହିଲେ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଫକ୍ସବରୋ,୩୦ା୬: କ୍ରମାଗତ ତୃତୀୟଥର ପାଇଁ ଜର୍ମାନୀ ବିଶ୍ୱକପ୍‌ର ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭିକ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେଇଛି। ଏଥର ଦଳ ପେନାଲ୍ଟି ଶୁଟ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ରେ ପାରାଗୁଏଠାରୁ ଲଜ୍ଜାଜନକ ପରାଜୟ ବରଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଆମେରିକୀୟ ଦେଶ ପାରାଗୁଏ ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟର ତୃତୀୟ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ରହି ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ରାଉଣ୍ଡକୁ ଉତ୍ତୀର୍ଣ୍ଣ ହୋଇଥିବାରୁ ଏହି ପରାଜୟକୁ ହଜମ କରିବା ଜର୍ମାନୀ ପାଇଁ ଅଧିକ କଷ୍ଟକର ହେଉଛି। ଏଥିଲାଗି ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ଖବରଦାତା ସମ୍ମିଳନୀରେ ଜର୍ମାନୀର ଅଧିନାୟକ ଜୋଶୁଆ କିମିଚ ପୂରା ଦଳକୁ ସମାଲୋଚନା କରିଛନ୍ତି।
ମ୍ୟାନେଜର ଜୁଲିଆନ ନାଗେଲ୍ସମାନଙ୍କୁ ବିଦା କରାଯିବ କି ପ୍ରଶ୍ନର ଉତ୍ତରରେ ଜୋଶୁଆ କହିଥିଲେ, ହଁ, ମୁଁ ତାହା ଆଶା କରୁଛି। କିନ୍ତୁ ଶେଷରେ ପିଚ୍‌ରେ ଖେଳୁଥିବା ଖେଳାଳିମାନେ ପରାଜୟ ପାଇଁ ଦାୟୀ। ଆମ ପାଖରେ ପାରାଗୁଏ ଭଳି ପ୍ରତିଦ୍ୱନ୍ଦ୍ୱୀଙ୍କୁ ହରାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଆକାଂକ୍ଷା ଓ ଦକ୍ଷତା ରହିବା ଉଚିତ। ଆମକୁ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ଜିତିବାର ଥିଲା।
ଏହାବାଦ୍‌ ଏକ୍ସଟ୍ରା ଟାଇମ୍‌ରେ ଭାର ଜରିଆରେ ଜୋନାଥନ ତା ଦେଇଥିବା ଗୋଲ୍‌କୁ ନାକଚ କରାଯିବା ଘଟଣା ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ଜୋଶୁଆ ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିଛନ୍ତି, କେହି ବି ରେଫରି କିମ୍ବା ପେନାଲ୍ଟି ଶୁଟ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌କୁ ଦାୟୀ କରିବା କଥା ଚିନ୍ତା କରିବା ଉଚିତ ନୁହେଁ। ଯଦି ତୁମେ ୧୨୦ ମିନିଟ୍‌ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ଜିତିପାରୁ ନାହଁ, ତେବେ ତୁମେ ଟୁର୍ନାମେଣ୍ଟରୁ ବାଦ୍‌ ପଡ଼ିବା ଦରକାର।
The post ବିଶ୍ୱକପ୍‌ରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେବା ପରେ ମୁହିଁ ଖୋଲିଲେ ଅଧିନାୟକ, କହିଲେ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Why India is singing along again: The business case for jingles in the age of reels
description: From 'Vicks Ki Goli Lo' to viral remixes, India's most memorable advertising tunes are proving that good music can outlive campaigns and still drive business
content: "Vicks ki goli lo, khich khich door karo." The moment those words cross my mind, I instinctively hear the tune that accompanied them. Before I know it, another melody takes over. "Sabki pasand Nirma... Washing Powder Nirma." Then comes "Vicco Turmeric, nahi cosmetic..." and almost immediately, "Buland Bharat Ki Buland Tasveer... Hamara Bajaj." It is remarkable how these songs have survived decades without the help of streaming platforms or playlists. I may not remember the exact television programmes that aired alongside them, but I remember every note, every pause and every word of these advertisements. That is the extraordinary power of a great jingle. It slips into popular culture so naturally that it stops feeling like advertising altogether. It becomes part of everyday life, resurfacing in conversations, family gatherings, school competitions and even casual humming while doing household chores. Few marketing tools have managed to achieve this kind of longevity. Today, those familiar tunes are finding an entirely new audience. India's advertising classics are making an unexpected comeback, not on television but across Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts and creator-led videos. The latest example is the revival of the iconic "Vicks Ki Goli Lo, Khich Khich Door Karo" jingle, which is now being interpreted by musicians across genres rather than being remade as a single polished commercial track. Electronic music producers, rappers, classical instrumentalists, beatboxers and percussion artists are giving the melody their own spin, allowing a song that first became popular decades ago to enter the playlists and feeds of Gen Z. It is a fascinating reminder that while advertising formats may evolve, memorable music rarely goes out of fashion. When advertising sounded like entertainment  To understand why jingles are suddenly back in the spotlight, it helps to remember what television looked like during the 1980s and 1990s. Indian households had far fewer entertainment choices. Families gathered around a single television set every evening, often watching the same channels together. Commercial breaks were not simply interruptions between programmes. They became part of the viewing experience. Children memorised advertisements almost as easily as nursery rhymes, while parents often found themselves unconsciously singing the same tunes during daily routines. Unlike today's fragmented media environment, where every individual watches different content on different devices, advertising back then enjoyed a rare collective audience. A successful commercial reached millions of viewers simultaneously, making it easier for brands to create shared cultural moments.           Advertising agencies understood that music could achieve what words alone could not. Instead of relying on lengthy product descriptions, they created simple melodies with repetitive lyrics and memorable hooks. Brand names were woven naturally into the songs, ensuring consumers could not separate the tune from the product. Long after the commercial ended, the melody continued to play inside people's heads. That translated into brand recall at supermarket shelves, neighbourhood stores and pharmacies, often influencing buying decisions without consumers even realising it. Before marketers spoke about emotional connections, sonic identities or consumer psychology, Indian jingles were already accomplishing all three. The soundtrack of an entire generation  Some advertising songs became so deeply embedded in Indian culture that they crossed the boundaries of marketing. "Washing Powder Nirma" did far more than promote a detergent. It became a song sung by children in school buses, performed during cultural programmes and repeated by families across the country. The commercial's dancing women dressed in spotless white saris became instantly recognisable symbols of the brand, but it was the melody that truly carried the campaign into popular memory. Decades later, many Indians can still sing every line without hesitation. The same happened with "Vicco Turmeric, nahi cosmetic...", which transformed a simple Ayurvedic skincare product into one of India's most recognisable advertising identities. The jingle survived multiple generations with remarkably little change because it consistently reinforced the product's positioning while remaining catchy enough to remember. Then there was "Buland Bharat Ki Buland Tasveer... Hamara Bajaj," perhaps one of the finest examples of advertising that sold an emotion rather than merely a product. Released during a period of economic optimism, the campaign celebrated aspiration, family values and national pride, allowing Bajaj to occupy an emotional space that extended well beyond scooters. Even healthcare brands mastered the art. The cheerful rhythm of "Vicks Ki Goli Lo, Khich Khich Door Karo" transformed a cough drop into one of India's most recognisable healthcare advertisements, demonstrating that even functional products could become part of everyday conversation through music. The 2000s shifted the focus away from music  The advertising landscape began changing rapidly after the turn of the century. Satellite television expanded dramatically, hundreds of channels competed for attention and audiences became increasingly fragmented. At the same time, celebrity endorsements grew more influential. Bollywood actors, cricketers and later social media personalities became the primary faces of campaigns. Advertisements became visually grander, production budgets increased and storytelling often took precedence over memorable melodies. International campaigns also influenced Indian marketing, leading several brands to adopt global creative templates that relied less on locally composed jingles. The arrival of smartphones and social media accelerated this transformation even further. Attention spans shrank as consumers began scrolling through endless streams of content. Brands focused on producing cinematic advertisements, influencer collaborations and visually striking campaigns designed to stop users mid-scroll. Music remained important, but traditional lyrical jingles gradually became less common. Instead, advertisers leaned towards background scores or licensed songs, believing that visual storytelling had become the dominant language of modern marketing. Yet even during this period, sound never completely lost its commercial value. Airtel's signature tune, composed by A.R. Rahman in 2002, demonstrated that a carefully crafted melody could become one of the strongest brand assets in the country. Unlike conventional jingles, it contained no lyrics, yet millions of Indians instantly associated those few notes with the telecom giant. It proved that while advertising styles had evolved, distinctive audio identities still possessed remarkable commercial power. Why social media has made jingles valuable again  Ironically, the platforms often blamed for shortening attention spans are now driving the return of sonic branding. Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts and similar short-form video platforms are built around sound. Algorithms encourage users to discover trending audio clips, while creators constantly search for catchy music that audiences will instantly recognise. Unlike television commercials that ended after 30 seconds, social media audio has the potential to be reused thousands or even millions of times by ordinary users. Every dance routine, comedy sketch, cooking video or parody built around a recognisable tune extends the life of a brand's message far beyond its original campaign. This changes the economics of advertising in significant ways. Instead of repeatedly paying for expensive television placements, brands can create audio assets that consumers voluntarily adopt. A memorable sound becomes intellectual property that continues generating value every time it is used by creators. Rather than forcing advertisements into people's feeds, marketers increasingly hope audiences will incorporate their music naturally into their own content. In many ways, this is the digital equivalent of children singing jingles in school playgrounds during the 1990s, only now those playgrounds exist on social media and reach millions of viewers simultaneously.           The Vicks revival reflects a broader marketing shift  The recent resurgence of the "Vicks Ki Goli Lo, Khich Khich Door Karo" jingle reflects exactly this change in thinking. Instead of releasing one updated commercial, the brand has embraced multiple interpretations by artists across genres. Musicians including Nucleya and Kaam Bhaari, alongside independent performers working in classical, jazz, rock and electronic music, have recreated the familiar melody using instruments ranging from flutes and live drums to beatboxing and even everyday objects as percussion. The result feels less like a traditional advertising campaign and more like a cultural conversation where creators reinterpret a shared memory for contemporary audiences. What makes this approach particularly interesting is that it avoids forcing nostalgia. Rather than telling consumers to remember the past, it invites creators to make the tune their own. That distinction matters because younger audiences are generally resistant to overtly nostalgic marketing. They are far more likely to engage with content that feels authentic, entertaining and creator driven. By allowing the jingle to evolve organically across platforms, the campaign demonstrates how legacy brand assets can remain culturally relevant without appearing outdated. Nostalgia is becoming a measurable business strategy  For marketers, nostalgia is no longer just an emotional trigger. It has become a commercially valuable strategy supported by consumer behaviour. Millennials who grew up with these jingles now represent one of India's largest spending groups, while Generation Z enjoys discovering retro culture through remixes, memes and vintage aesthetics. A single advertising tune therefore manages to speak to two entirely different audiences. Older consumers experience familiarity and trust, while younger viewers encounter something that feels quirky, distinctive and worth sharing. Few marketing assets possess the ability to bridge such a wide generational gap. This is particularly important at a time when customer acquisition costs across digital platforms continue to rise. Brands are constantly searching for creative ideas that maximise organic reach rather than relying solely on paid promotion. A memorable piece of music that consumers willingly reuse offers exactly that opportunity. Every creator who adopts the sound effectively becomes an unpaid distributor, extending the campaign's reach without requiring additional media spending.         The future of branding may be heard before it is seen  For years, marketers believed visual branding was everything. Logos became simpler, colour palettes more distinctive and packaging increasingly minimal. Yet in an era where consumers scroll past hundreds of images every day, sound is quietly reclaiming its importance. A recognisable melody can stop someone mid-scroll, trigger an emotional memory within seconds and remain lodged in the mind long after the video ends. That kind of recall is difficult to achieve through visuals alone. The revival of "Vicks Ki Goli Lo, Khich Khich Door Karo" is therefore much bigger than the return of a nostalgic tune. It signals a renewed appreciation for sonic branding at a time when digital platforms reward audio as much as visuals. India's biggest brands are beginning to realise that while advertisements may disappear from timelines within hours, a great melody can survive for generations. The most successful jingles were never simply songs written to sell products. They became cultural shorthand, passed from one generation to another almost effortlessly. In an age dominated by algorithms, influencers and fleeting trends, that may be the most valuable marketing asset of all. A campaign can end. A hashtag can fade. But a great jingle has a habit of staying in your head, and on balance sheets, for decades.

title: SwaLay Digital: Where music distribution meets ownership
description: An Indian company has created a complete rights protection system, including audio fingerprinting, content security, and government copyright registration, within a single music distribution platform. No Indian or global distributor has tried this on a large scale.SwaLay Digital, an Indian music distribution company operated by TalantonCore Group, is positioning itself as one of the world's most complete rights protection platforms for independent artists. It combines music distribution with its own content security technology and India's first built-in copyright registration tool. The company distributes music to over 50 global and Indian streaming platforms, including Spotify, Apple Music, JioSaavn, and Amazon Music. For the last two years, it has focused on building a rights framework entirely in-house. This system goes far beyond what any Indian distributor, and most global ones, currently provide.At the heart of this infrastructure is My D.N.A™️ (Digital Notarization & Authentication), a tool launched this year. It allows artists to file an official Indian copyright application without leaving the SwaLay platform. The process results in a copyright registration that is recognized under India's Copyright Act and the Information Technology Act. Artists can check the status of their application in real time from their existing portal."Copyright protection and distribution are the easy parts now," said Nikhil Jain, founder of SwaLay Digital. "The real problem nobody was solving is what happens after the music is out, who monitors for theft, who protects the rights, and who helps the artist truly own what they created. We built the company around that question."In addition to copyright registration, SwaLay has integrated ACRCloud and Shazam's audio fingerprinting service into its platform. This enables real-time detection of unauthorized use of an artist's music online, even if the music has been pitch-shifted, sped up, or partially reproduced. Audio files on the platform are available only through time-limited presigned URLs, which block direct downloads or redistributions by third parties. Each release automatically creates a verified SmartLink page, serving as a permanent public record of ownership.The combination of these tools, all developed and maintained in-house instead of relying on third-party services, places SwaLay in a small group of platforms worldwide that view rights protection as an essential aspect of distribution, not just an optional feature.This launch comes at a crucial time for India's independent music market. The country produced over 130,000 new releases in 2024, within an industry valued at around ₹2,100 crore. Most of those artists lack formal copyright protection for their work. Historically, the government registration process has required physical paperwork, legal expertise, and weeks of processing time, which are often beyond the reach of working musicians."An artist should be able to distribute their music, market it, and register the copyright all in one click from home," Jain stated. "That workflow didn't exist in India before we created it." SwaLay plans to expand its public rollout later in 2026, with international growth of its system aimed at Southeast Asia and the South Asian diaspora market.For more information, please visit: https://swalay.com/The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.

title: Ram Mandir: ମନ୍ଦିର ପରିଚାଳନା କରିବା ଆମ କାମ ନୁହେଁ: ଭିଏଚ୍‌ପି
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ: ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ଚୋରି ମାମଲାକୁ ନେଇ ବିବାଦ ଉପୁଜିଥିବାବେଳେ ଭିଏଚ୍‌ପି ( ବିଶ୍ବ ହିନ୍ଦୁ ପରିଷଦ) ଏହାର ଜଣେ ଶୀର୍ଷ ନେତା ତଥା ଶ୍ରୀରାମ ଜନ୍ମଭୂମି ତୀର୍ଥକ୍ଷେତ୍ର ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟ୍‌ର ସାଧାରଣ ସମ୍ପାଦକ ଭାବେ ଚମ୍ପତ ରାୟଙ୍କ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟରୁୁ ନିଜକୁ ଦୂରେଇ ରଖିଛି। ଭିଏଚ୍‌ପି ମଧ୍ୟ ଏହି ଦାନ ଚୋରି ମାମଲାରେ ପୁଙ୍ଖାନୁପୁଙ୍ଖ ତଦନ୍ତ ଦାବି କରିଛି। ଭିଏଚ୍‌ପି ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ସଭାପତି ଆଲୋକ କୁମାର କହିଛନ୍ତି, ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟ୍‌ ଦ୍ବାରା ନିକଟରେ ନିଆଯାଇଥିବା କୌଣସି ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତିରେ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠାନର କିଛି ଭୂମିକା ନାହିଁ କି ଏହା କୌଣସି ଦାୟିତ୍ବ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରୁନି।
ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ନିର୍ମାଣ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ସୁନିଶ୍ଚିତ ହେବାପରେ ରାମ ଜନ୍ମଭୂମି ଅଭିଯାନରେ ଭିଏଚ୍‌ପିର ଭୂମିକା ଶେଷ ହୋଇଛି। ସେ କହିଛନ୍ତି, ଆମର ଭୂମିକା ଶେଷ ହୋଇଛି। ଦେଶର ଯେକୌଣସି ଅଂଶରେ ମନ୍ଦିର ନିର୍ମାଣ କରିବା ଏବଂ ପରିଚାଳନା କରିବା ଆମ କାମ ନୁହେଁ। ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟ ଏହାକୁ ପରିଚାଳନା କରୁଛି ଏବଂ ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟ୍‌ରେ ଯାହା ହେଉଛି ସେଥିପାଇଁ ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟ୍‌ ହିଁ ଦା‌ୟୀ ରହିବ।
Congress Slams: ଆସ୍ଥା ଉପରେ ସିଧାସଳଖ ଆକ୍ରମଣ: ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ଦାନ ଚୋରି ନେଇ ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀଙ୍କ ନୀରବତାକୁ ନିନ୍ଦା କଲା କଂଗ୍ରେସ
ଏଥିପାଇଁ ଆରଏସଏସ୍‌ ଏବଂ ସରକାରକୁ ଉତ୍ତରଦାୟୀ କରିବାର ଉଦ୍ୟମ ଯୁକ୍ତିଯୁକ୍ତ ନୁହେଁ ବୋଲି ସେ କହିଛନ୍ତି। ରାମ ଜନ୍ମଭୂମି ତୀର୍ଥକ୍ଷେତ୍ର ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟ୍‌ର ସାଧାରଣ ସମ୍ପାଦକ ଭାବେ ଶ୍ରୀ ଚମ୍ପତ ରାୟ ଯେଉଁ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟରେ ଜଡ଼ିତ ଅଛନ୍ତି ମୁଁ ସେଥିରୁ ନିଜକୁ ଦୂରେଇ ରଖୁଛି ବୋଲି କୁମାର କହିଛନ୍ତି। ଉଲ୍ଲେଖଯୋଗ୍ୟ ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ଚୋରି ମାମଲାରେ ମୋଟ୍‌ ୮ ଜଣ ଗିରଫ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ସମସ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ଏବେ ୧୪ ଦିନିଆ ବିଚାରବିଭାଗୀୟ ହାଜତ ପଠାଯାଇଛି।
